29000.title: How Americans Respond to Idiosyncratic and Exogenous Changes in Household Wealth and Unearned Income
29000.zh_title: 美国人如何应对家庭财富和非劳动收入的特殊外生变化
29000.authors: Mikhail Golosov, Michael Graber, Magne Mogstad, David Novgorodsky
29000.abstract: We study how Americans respond to idiosyncratic and exogenous changes in household wealth and unearned income. Our analyses combine administrative data on U.S. lottery winners with an event-study design that exploits variation in the timing of lottery wins. Our first contribution is to estimate the earnings responses to these windfall gains, finding significant and sizable wealth and income effects. On average, an extra dollar of unearned income in a given period reduces pre-tax labor earnings by about 50 cents, decreases total labor taxes by 10 cents, and increases consumption by 60 cents. These effects are heterogeneous across the income distribution, with households in higher quartiles of the income distribution reducing their earnings by a larger amount. Our second contribution is to develop and apply a rich life-cycle model in which heterogeneous households face non-linear taxes and make earnings choices along both intensive and extensive margins. By mapping this model to our estimated earnings responses, we obtain informative bounds on the impacts of two policy reforms: an introduction of UBI and an increase in top marginal tax rates. Our last contribution is to study how additional wealth and unearned income affect a wide range of behavior, including geographic mobility and neighborhood choice, retirement decisions and labor market exit, family formation and dissolution, entry into entrepreneurship, and job-to-job mobility.
29000.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国人如何应对家庭财富和非劳动收入的特殊外生变化。我们的分析结合了美国彩票中奖者的行政数据与利用中奖时间变化的事件研究设计。我们的第一个贡献是估计了对这些意外之财的收入反应，发现了显著且规模可观的财富效应和收入效应。平均而言，在给定时期内每增加一美元的非劳动收入，会使税前劳动收入减少约50美分，使总劳动税减少10美分，并使消费增加60美分。这些效应在收入分布上存在异质性，收入分布较高四分位数的家庭减少的收入金额更大。我们的第二个贡献是开发并应用了一个丰富的生命周期模型，在该模型中，异质性家庭面临非线性税收，并在集约边际和广延边际上做出收入选择。通过将此模型与我们估计的收入反应进行匹配，我们获得了关于两项政策改革影响的信息性边界：引入全民基本收入（UBI）和提高最高边际税率。我们的最后一个贡献是研究额外的财富和非劳动收入如何影响广泛的行为，包括地理流动性和社区选择、退休决策和劳动力市场退出、家庭形成和解体、创业进入以及工作转换。

29019.title: Body-Worn Cameras and Adjudication of Citizen Complaints of Police Misconduct
29019.zh_title: 执法记录仪与警察不当行为投诉的裁决
29019.authors: Suat Çubukçu, Nusret M. Sahin, Erdal Tekin, Volkan Topalli
29019.abstract: Police body-worn cameras (BWCs) have been the subject of much research on how the technology’s enhanced documentation of police/citizen interactions impact police behavior. Less attention has been paid to how BWC recordings affect the adjudication of citizen complaints against the police. We employ citizen complaint data from the Chicago Police Department and Civilian Office of Police Accountability filed between 2012-2020 to determine the extent to which BWC footage enhances the efficacy of evidence used to formulate a conclusion of responsibility, and whether bias against complainants based on race would subsequently be reduced. Accordingly, we exploit the staggered deployment of BWCs across 22 Chicago police districts over time to estimate the effect of BWCs on these outcomes. Our findings indicate that BWCs led to a significant decrease in the dismissal of investigations due to insufficient evidence ("not sustained") as well as a significant increase in disciplinary actions against police officers ("sustained" outcomes”) with sufficient evidence to sanction their misconduct. We further find that disparities in complaints across racial groups for the “unsustained” category fade away with the implementation of BWCs.
29019.zh_abstract: 警察随身执法记录仪（BWCs）对警察与公民互动过程的增强记录如何影响警察行为，已成为大量研究的主题。然而，关于BWC录像如何影响公民对警察投诉的裁决，关注较少。我们利用芝加哥警察局和公民警察问责办公室在2012年至2020年间提交的公民投诉数据，来确定BWC录像在多大程度上增强了用于形成责任结论的证据效力，以及是否因此减少了基于投诉人种族的偏见。据此，我们利用BWC在芝加哥22个警区随时间逐步部署的情况，来估计BWC对这些结果的影响。我们的研究结果表明，BWC导致因证据不足而驳回调查（“不成立”）的情况显著减少，同时，因有足够证据制裁警察不当行为而对其采取纪律处分（“成立”结果）的情况显著增加。我们进一步发现，随着BWC的实施，不同种族群体在“不成立”类别投诉中的差异消失了。

29018.title: Could Vaccine Dose Stretching Reduce COVID-19 Deaths?
29018.zh_title: 疫苗剂量稀释能否减少COVID-19死亡人数？
29018.authors: Witold Więcek, Amrita Ahuja, Michael Kremer, Alexandre Simoes Gomes, Christopher Snyder, Alex Tabarrok, Brandon Joel Tan
29018.abstract: We argue that alternative COVID-19 vaccine dosing regimens could potentially dramatically accelerate global COVID-19 vaccination and reduce mortality, and that the costs of testing these regimens are dwarfed by their potential benefits. We first use the high correlation between neutralizing antibody response and efficacy against disease (Khoury et. al. 2021) to show that half or even quarter doses of some vaccines generate immune responses associated with high vaccine efficacy. We then use an SEIR model to estimate that under these efficacy levels, doubling or quadrupling the rate of vaccination by using fractional doses would dramatically reduce infections and mortality. Since the correlation between immune response and efficacy may not be fully predictive of efficacy with fractional doses, we then use the SEIR model to show that fractional dosing would substantially reduce infections and mortality over a wide range of plausible efficacy levels. Further immunogenicity studies for a range of vaccine and dose combinations could deliver outcomes in weeks and could be conducted with a few hundred healthy volunteers. National regulatory authorities could also decide to test efficacy of fractional dosing in the context of vaccination campaigns based on existing immune response data, as some did for delayed second doses. If efficacy turned out to be high, the approach could be implemented broadly, while if it turned out to be low, downside risk could be limited by administering full doses to those who had received fractional doses. The SEIR model also suggests that delaying second vaccine doses will likely have substantial mortality benefits for multiple, but not all, vaccine-variant combinations, underscoring the importance of ongoing surveillance. Finally, we find that for countries choosing between approved but lower efficacy vaccines available immediately and waiting for mRNA vaccines, using immediately available vaccines typically reduces mortality.
29018.zh_abstract: 我们认为，替代性的COVID-19疫苗接种方案可能极大地加速全球COVID-19疫苗接种并降低死亡率，并且测试这些方案的成本远低于其潜在收益。我们首先利用中和抗体反应与针对疾病的疫苗效力之间的高度相关性（Khoury等人，2021年）表明，某些疫苗的半剂量甚至四分之一剂量能产生与高疫苗效力相关的免疫反应。然后，我们使用SEIR模型估计，在这些效力水平下，通过使用分次剂量将疫苗接种率提高一倍或四倍，将大幅减少感染和死亡人数。由于免疫反应与效力之间的相关性可能无法完全预测分次剂量的效力，我们随后使用SEIR模型表明，在广泛可能的效力水平范围内，分次剂量将显著减少感染和死亡人数。针对一系列疫苗和剂量组合的进一步免疫原性研究可以在数周内得出结果，并且只需几百名健康志愿者即可进行。国家监管机构也可以根据现有的免疫反应数据，决定在疫苗接种活动中测试分次剂量的效力，正如一些机构对延迟第二剂接种所做的那样。如果最终证明效力很高，该方法可以广泛实施；而如果效力较低，则可以通过向已接种分次剂量的人补种全剂量来限制下行风险。SEIR模型还表明，延迟第二剂疫苗接种可能对多种（但并非所有）疫苗-病毒变异组合产生显著的死亡率收益，这强调了持续监测的重要性。最后，我们发现，对于在可立即获得的已获批但效力较低的疫苗与等待mRNA疫苗之间进行选择的国家，使用可立即获得的疫苗通常能降低死亡率。

29017.title: Playlisting Favorites: Measuring Platform Bias in the Music Industry
29017.zh_title: 歌单偏好：衡量音乐产业中的平台偏见
29017.authors: Luis Aguiar, Joel Waldfogel, Sarah B. Waldfogel
29017.abstract: Platforms are growing increasingly powerful, raising questions about whether their power might be exercised with bias. While bias is inherently difficult to measure, we identify a context within the music industry that is amenable to bias testing. Our approach requires ex ante platform assessments of commercial promise - such as the rank order in which products are presented - along with information on eventual product success. A platform is biased against a product type if the type attains greater success, conditional on ex ante assessment. Theoretical considerations and voiced industry concerns suggest the possibility of platform biases in favor of major record labels, and industry participants also point to bias against women. Using data on Spotify curators' rank of songs on New Music Friday playlists in 2017, we find that Spotify's New Music Friday rankings favor independent-label music, along with some evidence of bias in favor of music by women. Despite challenges that independent-label artists and women face in the music industry, Spotify's New Music curation appears to favor them.
29017.zh_abstract: 平台正变得越来越强大，这引发了关于其权力是否可能被带有偏见地行使的疑问。虽然偏见本质上难以衡量，但我们在音乐产业中确定了一个适合进行偏见测试的背景。我们的方法需要平台对商业前景的事前评估——例如产品呈现的排序——以及关于产品最终成功的信息。如果某一产品类型在给定事前评估的条件下取得了更大的成功，则该平台对该产品类型存在偏见。理论考量以及业界表达的担忧表明，平台可能存在有利于主要唱片公司的偏见，同时行业参与者还指出了针对女性的偏见。利用2017年Spotify策展人对“新音乐星期五”歌单中歌曲排名的数据，我们发现Spotify的“新音乐星期五”排名有利于独立厂牌音乐，同时也有一些证据表明存在有利于女性音乐的偏见。尽管独立厂牌艺术家和女性在音乐产业中面临挑战，但Spotify的新音乐策展似乎对他们有利。

29016.title: Pricing Without Mispricing
29016.authors: Tobias J. Moskowitz, Robert F. Stambaugh
29016.abstract: We test whether a model could price assets if the market were efficient. Specifically, we test whether a model assigns zero alpha to a strategy that uses only decade-old information, which even an inefficient market would correctly price. Persistence in the strategy’s multifactor betas gives our test power. Multifactor betas can help capture mispricing, but persistence in those betas then leads the multifactor model to distort expected returns well after that information gets priced correctly. The CAPM passes our test, but prominent multifactor models do not.
29016.zh_abstract: 我们检验一个模型是否能在市场有效的情况下为资产定价。具体来说，我们检验一个模型是否会对一个仅使用十年前信息的策略赋予零阿尔法，即使是一个无效市场也能正确定价这些信息。该策略的多因子贝塔值的持续性为我们的检验提供了效力。多因子贝塔值有助于捕捉错误定价，但贝塔值的持续性随后会导致多因子模型在信息被正确定价很久之后扭曲预期收益。CAPM通过了我们的检验，但著名的多因子模型却没有。

29015.title: Entrepôt: Hubs, Scale, and Trade Costs
29015.zh_title: 转口港：枢纽、规模与贸易成本
29015.authors: Sharat Ganapati, Woan Foong Wong, Oren Ziv
29015.abstract: We study the global trade network and quantify its trade and welfare impact. We document that the trade network is a hub-and-spoke system where 80% of trade is shipped indirectly, nearly all via entrepôts—major hubs that facilitate trade between many origins and destinations. We estimate indirect-shipping-consistent trade costs using a model where shipments can be sent indirectly through an endogenous transport network and develop a geography-based instrument to estimate scale economies in shipping. Network and scale effects propagate local trade cost changes globally. Counterfactual infrastructure improvements at entrepôts generate ten times the global welfare impact relative to non-entrepôts.
29015.zh_abstract: 我们研究全球贸易网络并量化其贸易和福利影响。我们记录到，贸易网络是一个枢纽-辐射系统，其中80%的贸易是通过间接方式运输的，几乎全部经由转口港——这些主要枢纽促进了众多原产地和目的地之间的贸易。我们使用一个允许货物通过内生运输网络间接发送的模型，估计了与间接运输一致的贸易成本，并开发了一个基于地理的工具来估计航运中的规模经济。网络效应和规模效应将局部贸易成本的变化传播到全球。与在非转口港相比，在转口港进行反事实的基础设施改善所产生的全球福利影响是其十倍。

29014.title: Trade, Competitive Exclusion, and the Slow-Motion Extinction of the Southern Resident Killer Whales
29014.zh_title: 贸易、竞争排斥与南方居留虎鲸的缓慢灭绝
29014.abstract: Orcinus Orca is the world's largest predator, and simultaneously a significant tourist asset and cultural icon for much of the Pacific Northwest. In the past two decades, the Southern Resident Killer whales (SRKW) have declined by more than 25 percent, and this population appears on a slow-motion path towards extinction. This paper combines elements from biology and economics to put forward a new methodology for investigating their collapse and presents empirical work supporting its novel explanation - the Orca Conjecture. The key mechanism is ecological - Gause's law of competitive exclusion - combined with a shock coming from booming trade with Asia. Using three different empirical methods drawn from economics, I find the attendant noise disturbance from increased ship traffic post-1998 has lowered births and raised deaths significantly, placing the SRKW on a slow-motion path towards extinction.
29014.zh_abstract: 虎鲸是世界上最大的捕食者，同时也是太平洋西北地区重要的旅游资产和文化象征。在过去二十年中，南方居留虎鲸（SRKW）的数量减少了超过25%，这一种群似乎正沿着一条缓慢的轨迹走向灭绝。本文结合生物学和经济学的元素，提出了一种调查其崩溃的新方法，并提供了支持其新颖解释——虎鲸猜想——的实证工作。关键机制是生态学上的——高斯竞争排斥定律——加上来自与亚洲蓬勃发展的贸易的冲击。利用来自经济学的三种不同实证方法，我发现1998年后因船舶交通增加而产生的伴随噪音干扰显著降低了出生率并提高了死亡率，使南方居留虎鲸走上了缓慢灭绝的道路。
29014.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI；JEL：F18, F64, Q37, Q5, Q57

29013.title: The Evolution of Market Power in the US Auto Industry
29013.zh_title: 美国汽车行业市场势力的演变
29013.authors: Paul L. E. Grieco, Charles Murry, Ali Yurukoglu
29013.abstract: We construct measures of industry performance and welfare in the U.S. car and light truck market from 1980-2018. We estimate a differentiated products demand model for this market using product level data on market shares, prices, and product characteristics, and consumer level data on demographics, purchases, and stated second choices. We estimate marginal costs under the conduct assumption of Nash-Bertrand pricing. We relate trends in consumer welfare and markups to industry trends in market structure and the composition of products, like the rise of import competition, the proliferation of SUV's, and changes in vehicle characteristics. We find that although prices rose over time, concentration and market power decreased substantially. Consumer welfare increased over time due to improving product quality and falling marginal costs. The fraction of total surplus accruing to consumers also increased.
29013.zh_abstract: 我们构建了1980年至2018年美国轿车和轻型卡车市场的行业绩效和福利衡量指标。我们利用产品层面的市场份额、价格和产品特征数据，以及消费者层面的人口统计、购买和陈述的第二选择数据，估计了该市场的差异化产品需求模型。我们在纳什-伯特兰定价的行为假设下估计了边际成本。我们将消费者福利和加成的趋势与行业市场结构和产品构成的变化联系起来，例如进口竞争的加剧、SUV的普及以及车辆特征的变化。我们发现，尽管价格随时间上涨，但集中度和市场势力大幅下降。由于产品质量的提高和边际成本的下降，消费者福利随时间增加。消费者获得的剩余份额也增加了。

29012.title: Efficiency and Equity Impacts of Urban Transportation Policies with Equilibrium Sorting
29012.zh_title: 具有均衡分选的城市交通政策的效率与公平影响
29012.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Shanjun Li, Andrew R. Waxman, Jing Wu, Tianli Xia
29012.abstract: We estimate an equilibrium sorting model of housing location and commuting mode choice with endogenous traffic congestion to evaluate the efficiency and equity impacts of a menu of urban transportation policies. Leveraging fine-scale data from household travel diaries and housing transaction data identifying residents’ home and work locations in Beijing, we recover structural estimates with rich preference heterogeneity over both travel mode and residential location decisions. Counterfactual simulations demonstrate that even when different policies reduce congestion to the same degree, their impacts on residential sorting and social welfare differ drastically. First, driving restrictions create large distortions in travel choices and are welfare reducing. Second, distance-based congestion pricing reduces the spatial separation between residences and workplaces and improves welfare for all households when it is accompanied by revenue recycling. Third, sorting undermines the congestion reduction under driving restrictions and subway expansion but strengthens it under congestion pricing. Fourth, the combination of congestion pricing and subway expansion delivers the greatest congestion relief and efficiency gains. It can also be self-financed, with the cost of subway expansion fully covered by congestion pricing revenue. Finally, eliminating preference heterogeneity, household sorting, or endogenous congestion significantly biases the welfare estimates and changes the relative welfare rankings of the policies.
29012.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个包含内生交通拥堵的住房选址和通勤方式选择的均衡分选模型，以评估一系列城市交通政策的效率和公平影响。利用来自北京的家庭出行日志和识别居民家庭与工作地点的住房交易数据的精细尺度数据，我们恢复了在出行方式和居住选址决策上具有丰富偏好异质性的结构估计。反事实模拟表明，即使不同政策将拥堵减少到相同程度，它们对居住分选和社会福利的影响也截然不同。首先，限行政策在出行选择上造成了巨大扭曲，并降低了福利。其次，基于距离的拥堵收费减少了居住地与工作地之间的空间分离，并且在伴随收入循环利用时改善了所有家庭的福利。第三，分选削弱了限行和地铁扩建下的拥堵缓解效果，但增强了拥堵收费下的效果。第四，拥堵收费与地铁扩建相结合带来了最大的拥堵缓解和效率提升。它还可以实现自筹资金，地铁扩建的成本完全由拥堵收费收入覆盖。最后，消除偏好异质性、家庭分选或内生拥堵会显著偏差福利估计，并改变政策的相对福利排序。
29012.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：H23, R3, R41, R48, R51

29011.title: Quantifying the High-Frequency Trading "Arms Race"
29011.zh_title: 量化高频交易“军备竞赛”
29011.authors: Matteo Aquilina, Eric Budish, Peter O'Neill
29011.abstract: We use stock exchange message data to quantify the negative aspect of high-frequency trading, known as “latency arbitrage.” The key difference between message data and widely-familiar limit order book data is that message data contain attempts to trade or cancel that fail. This allows the researcher to observe both winners and losers in a race, whereas in limit order book data you cannot see the losers, so you cannot directly see the races. We find that latency-arbitrage races are very frequent (about one per minute per symbol for FTSE 100 stocks), extremely fast (the modal race lasts 5-10 millionths of a second), and account for a remarkably large portion of overall trading volume (about 20%). Race participation is concentrated, with the top 6 firms accounting for over 80% of all race wins and losses. The average race is worth just a small amount (about half a price tick), but because of the large volumes the stakes add up. Our main estimates suggest that races constitute roughly one-third of price impact and the effective spread (key microstructure measures of the cost of liquidity), that latency arbitrage imposes a roughly 0.5 basis point tax on trading, that market designs that eliminate latency arbitrage would reduce the market's cost of liquidity by 17%, and that the total sums at stake are on the order of $\$5$ billion per year in global equity markets alone.
29011.zh_abstract: 我们利用证券交易所的消息数据来量化高频交易的负面方面，即“延迟套利”。消息数据与广为人知的限价订单簿数据之间的关键区别在于，消息数据包含了失败的交易或取消尝试。这使得研究人员能够观察到竞赛中的赢家和输家，而在限价订单簿数据中，你无法看到输家，因此无法直接观察到竞赛。我们发现，延迟套利竞赛非常频繁（对于富时100指数成分股，每个股票大约每分钟一次），速度极快（最常见的竞赛持续5到10微秒），并且占总交易量的比例非常大（约20%）。竞赛参与高度集中，前6家公司占据了所有竞赛胜负的80%以上。平均每次竞赛的价值很小（大约半个价格跳动），但由于交易量巨大，总赌注累积起来相当可观。我们的主要估计表明，竞赛约占价格影响和有效价差（衡量流动性成本的关键微观结构指标）的三分之一，延迟套利对交易征收了大约0.5个基点的税，消除延迟套利的市场设计将使市场的流动性成本降低17%，并且仅在全球股票市场中，每年的总赌注金额就高达约50亿美元。
29011.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO；JEL：D47, G1, G12, G14

29010.title: A Denial a Day Keeps the Doctor Away
29010.authors: Abe Dunn, Joshua D. Gottlieb, Adam Shapiro, Daniel J. Sonnenstuhl, Pietro Tebaldi
29010.abstract: Who bears the consequences of administrative problems in healthcare? We use data on repeated interactions between a large sample of U.S. physicians and many different insurers to document the complexity of healthcare billing, and estimate its economic costs for doctors and consequences for patients. Observing the back-and-forth sequences of claim denials and resubmissions for past visits, we can estimate physicians’ costs of haggling with insurers to collect payments. Combining these costs with the revenue never collected, we estimate that physicians lose 18% of Medicaid revenue to billing problems, compared with 4.7% for Medicare and 2.4% for commercial insurers. Identifying off of physician movers and practices that span state boundaries, we find that physicians respond to billing problems by refusing to accept Medicaid patients in states with more severe billing hurdles. These hurdles are quantitatively just as important as payment rates for explaining variation in physicians’ willingness to treat Medicaid patients. We conclude that administrative frictions have first-order costs for doctors, patients, and equality of access to healthcare. We quantify the potential economic gains—in terms of reduced public spending or increased access to physicians—if these frictions could be reduced, and find them to be sizable.
29010.zh_abstract: 谁承担了医疗保健中行政问题的后果？我们利用大量美国医生与多家不同保险公司之间重复互动的数据，记录了医疗计费的复杂性，并估计了其对医生的经济成本以及对患者的影响。通过观察过去就诊中索赔拒绝和重新提交的来回序列，我们可以估计医生为收取款项而与保险公司讨价还价的成本。将这些成本与从未收回的收入相结合，我们估计医生因计费问题损失了18%的医疗补助收入，而医疗保险和商业保险公司的这一比例分别为4.7%和2.4%。通过识别跨州执业的医生和诊所，我们发现医生通过拒绝接受医疗补助患者来应对计费问题，尤其是在计费障碍更严重的州。这些障碍在解释医生治疗医疗补助患者意愿的差异方面，与支付率在数量上同等重要。我们得出结论，行政摩擦对医生、患者和医疗保健可及性的平等具有首要成本。我们量化了如果这些摩擦能够减少，在减少公共支出或增加医生可及性方面的潜在经济收益，并发现这些收益相当可观。
29010.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：H52, H75, I11, I13, I14, I18, L14, L33, L88

29009.title: Welfare Costs of Idiosyncratic and Aggregate Consumption Shocks
29009.zh_title: 特质性和总消费冲击的福利成本
29009.abstract: I estimate welfare benefits of eliminating idiosyncratic consumption shocks unrelated to the business cycle as 47.3% of household utility and benefits of eliminating idiosyncratic shocks related to the business cycle as 3.4% of utility. Estimates of the former substantially exceed earlier ones because I distinguish between idiosyncratic shocks related/unrelated to the business cycle, estimate the negative skewness of shocks, target moments of idiosyncratic shocks from household-level CEX data, and target market moments. Benefits of eliminating aggregate shocks are 7.7% of utility. Policy should focus on insuring idiosyncratic shocks unrelated to the business cycle, such as the death of a household’s prime wage earner and job layoffs not necessarily related to recessions.
29009.zh_abstract: 我估计，消除与经济周期无关的特质性消费冲击的福利收益为家庭效用的47.3%，而消除与经济周期相关的特质性冲击的收益为效用的3.4%。前者估计值大大超过早期估计，因为我区分了与商业周期相关/无关的特质性冲击，估计了冲击的负偏度，从家庭层面的CEX数据中定位了特质性冲击的矩，并定位了市场矩。消除总冲击的收益为效用的7.7%。政策应侧重于保障与经济周期无关的特质性冲击，例如家庭主要工资收入者的死亡和不一定与经济衰退相关的失业。
29009.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D31, D52, E2, E21, E24, E32, E44, G01, G12, J6

29008.title: Collective Progress: Dynamics of Exit Waves
29008.zh_title: 集体进展：退出浪潮的动态
29008.authors: Doruk Cetemen, Can Urgun, Leeat Yariv
29008.abstract: We study a model of collective search by teams. Discoveries beget discoveries and correlated search results are governed by a Brownian path. Search results' variation at any point---the search scope---is jointly controlled. Agents individually choose when to cease search and implement their best discovery. We characterize equilibrium and optimal policies. Search scope is constant and independent of search outcomes as long as no member leaves. It declines after departures. A simple drawdown stopping boundary governs each agent’s search termination. We show the emergence of endogenous exit waves, whereby possibly heterogeneous agents cease search all at once.
29008.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个团队集体搜索的模型。发现催生发现，相关的搜索结果由一个布朗运动路径支配。任何时刻搜索结果的变化——即搜索范围——是共同控制的。代理人各自选择何时停止搜索并实施其最佳发现。我们刻画了均衡和最优策略。只要没有成员离开，搜索范围是恒定的，并且与搜索结果无关。在成员离开后，搜索范围会下降。一个简单的回撤停止边界支配着每个代理人的搜索终止。我们展示了内生退出浪潮的出现，其中可能异质的代理人会同时停止搜索。
29008.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, POL, PR；JEL：C73, D81, D83, O35

29007.title: Non-Modernization: Power-Culture Trajectories and the Dynamics of Political Institutions
29007.zh_title: 非现代化：权力-文化轨迹与政治制度的动态
29007.abstract: Modernization theory is a cornerstone of much of political science, despite the mounting evidence against its predictions. In this paper, we argue that the theory's failings are rooted in predictions that are not conditioned on history and cultural configurations. We outline a theory in which the interplay of the distribution of political power and cultural configurations lead to three distinct self-reinforcing paths of political development, with very different state-society relations, institutions, and economic structures. These are paths to Despotic, Absent and Shackled leviathans. The role of cultural configurations, made up of attributes in a society's culture set, is critical in legitimizing the social arrangements in each path. For example, a Despotic Leviathan, as in China, cannot be understood without appreciating how Confucian culture has been used to bolster a worldview in which rulers are supposed to be virtuous and regular people are discouraged from political participation. We argued that this interpretation is not inherent to Confucian thought, but has to be understood as an endogenous outcome along the trajectory to the Despotic Leviathan. None of the three different paths we highlight support modernization theory. Under the Absent Leviathan, there is no economic modernization. Under the Despotic Leviathan, economic growth bolsters the existing regime and its supporting cultural configuration, with no tendency towards democracy or associate political changes. Under the Shackled Leviathan, there are dynamics leading to economic growth and political changes with greater bottom-up participation. Nevertheless, the causation does not go from the former to the latter, and these changes are critically dependent on cultural and political entrepreneurship in order to formulate and popularize new cultural configurations and institutionalize political changes.
29007.zh_abstract: 现代化理论是许多政治学的基石，尽管越来越多的证据反对其预测。在本文中，我们认为该理论的失败源于其预测没有以历史和文化配置为条件。我们概述了一个理论，其中政治权力分配与文化配置的相互作用导致了三种不同的自我强化的政治发展路径，具有截然不同的国家-社会关系、制度和经济结构。这些是通往专制利维坦、缺席利维坦和束缚利维坦的路径。文化配置的作用，由社会文化集中的属性构成，对于每条路径中社会安排的合法化至关重要。例如，像中国这样的专制利维坦，如果不理解儒家文化如何被用来强化一种世界观——即统治者应该是贤德的，而普通民众被劝阻不要参与政治——就无法理解。我们认为，这种解释并非儒家思想所固有，而必须被理解为通往专制利维坦轨迹上的内生结果。我们强调的三种不同路径都不支持现代化理论。在缺席利维坦下，没有经济现代化。在专制利维坦下，经济增长巩固了现有政权及其支持性文化配置，没有走向民主或相关政治变革的趋势。在束缚利维坦下，存在导致经济增长和政治变革的动态，具有更大的自下而上参与。然而，因果关系并非从前到后，这些变革关键依赖于文化和政治企业家精神，以制定和推广新的文化配置，并将政治变革制度化。

29006.title: Epidemic Exposure, Fintech Adoption, and the Digital Divide
29006.zh_title: 流行病暴露、金融科技采纳与数字鸿沟
29006.authors: Orkun Saka, Barry Eichengreen, Cevat Giray Aksoy
29006.abstract: We ask whether epidemic exposure leads to a shift in financial technology usage and who participates in this shift. We exploit a dataset combining Gallup World Polls and Global Findex surveys for some 250,000 individuals in 140 countries, merging them with information on the incidence of epidemics and local 3G internet infrastructure. Epidemic exposure is associated with an increase in remote-access (online/mobile) banking and substitution from bank branch-based to ATM activity. The temporary nature of the effects we identify is more consistent with a demand channel rather than that of supply with high initial fixed costs. Exploring heterogeneity using a machine-learning driven approach, we find that young, high-income earners in full-time employment have the greatest tendency to shift to online/mobile transactions in response to epidemics. Baseline effects are larger for individuals with better ex ante 3G signal coverage, highlighting the role of the digital divide in adaption to new technologies necessitated by adverse external shocks.
29006.zh_abstract: 我们探究流行病暴露是否会导致金融科技使用方式的转变，以及谁参与了这种转变。我们利用一个结合了盖洛普世界民意调查和全球金融指数调查的数据集，涵盖了140个国家约25万名个体，并将其与流行病发生信息和当地3G互联网基础设施信息相结合。流行病暴露与远程访问（在线/移动）银行业务的增加以及从银行网点活动向ATM活动的替代相关。我们识别的效应的暂时性更符合需求渠道，而非具有高初始固定成本的供给渠道。通过使用机器学习驱动的方法探索异质性，我们发现，全职工作的年轻高收入者在应对流行病时，转向在线/移动交易的倾向最大。对于事前3G信号覆盖更好的个体，基线效应更大，这凸显了数字鸿沟在适应由不利外部冲击所要求的新技术中的作用。
29006.meta: Programs：EH, IFM, PR；JEL：G0, G20, G59, I10

29004.title: The Dynastic Benefits of Early Childhood Education
29004.authors: Jorge Luis García, Frederik H. Bennhoff, Duncan Ermini Leaf, James J. Heckman
29004.abstract: This paper monetizes the life-cycle intragenerational and intergenerational benefits of the Perry Preschool Project, a pioneering high-quality early childhood education program implemented before Head Start that targeted disadvantaged African-Americans and was evaluated by a randomized trial. It has the longest follow-up of any experimentally evaluated early childhood education program. We follow participants into late midlife as well as their children into adulthood. Impacts on the original participants and their children generate substantial benefits. Access to life-cycle data enables us to evaluate the accuracy of widely used schemes to forecast life-cycle benefits from early-life test scores, which we find wanting.
29004.zh_abstract: 本文对佩里学前教育项目（一个在“开端计划”之前实施的、针对弱势非裔美国人的开创性高质量幼儿教育项目，并通过随机试验进行评估）的生命周期内代内和代际收益进行了货币化。它是任何经过实验评估的幼儿教育项目中随访时间最长的。我们跟踪参与者直至中晚年，以及他们的子女直至成年。对原始参与者及其子女的影响产生了可观的收益。获取生命周期数据使我们能够评估广泛使用的、根据早期测试分数预测生命周期收益的方案之准确性，我们发现这些方案存在不足。
29004.meta: Programs：CH, ED, PE；JEL：C93, H43, I28, J13

29003.title: Tracking Weekly State-Level Economic Conditions
29003.zh_title: 追踪每周州级经济状况
29003.authors: Christiane Baumeister, Danilo Leiva-León, Eric R. Sims
29003.abstract: In this paper, we develop a novel dataset of weekly economic conditions indices for the 50 U.S. states going back to 1987 based on mixed-frequency dynamic factor models with weekly, monthly, and quarterly variables that cover multiple dimensions of state economies. We show that there is considerable heterogeneity in the length, depth, and timing of business cycles across individual states. We assess the role of states in national recessions and propose an aggregate indicator that allows us to gauge the overall weakness of the U.S. economy. We also illustrate the usefulness of these state-level indices for quantifying the main forces contributing to the economic collapse caused by the COVID-19 pandemic and for evaluating the effectiveness of federal economic policies like the Paycheck Protection Program.
29003.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们基于混合频率动态因子模型，利用涵盖州经济多个维度的周度、月度和季度变量，开发了一个可追溯至1987年的美国50个州每周经济状况指数的新数据集。我们表明，各州商业周期的长度、深度和时间点存在相当大的异质性。我们评估了各州在国家经济衰退中的作用，并提出了一个综合指标，使我们能够衡量美国经济的整体疲软程度。我们还说明了这些州级指数在量化导致COVID-19大流行造成的经济崩溃的主要力量，以及评估联邦经济政策（如薪资保护计划）有效性方面的实用性。

29002.title: Test Assets and Weak Factors
29002.authors: Stefano Giglio, Dacheng Xiu, Dake Zhang
29002.abstract: Estimation and testing of factor models in asset pricing requires choosing a set of test assets. The choice of test assets determines how well different factor risk premia can be identified: if only few assets are exposed to a factor, that factor is weak, which makes standard estimation and inference incorrect. In other words, the strength of a factor is not an inherent property of the factor: it is a property of the cross-section used in the analysis. We propose a novel way to select assets from a universe of test assets and estimate the risk premium of a factor of interest, as well as the entire stochastic discount factor, that explicitly accounts for weak factors and test assets with highly correlated risk exposures. We refer to our methodology as supervised principal component analysis (SPCA), because it iterates an asset selection step and a principal-component estimation step. We provide the asymptotic properties of our estimator, and compare its limiting behavior with that of alternative estimators proposed in the recent literature, which rely on PCA, Ridge, Lasso, and Partial Least Squares (PLS). We find that the SPCA is superior in the presence of weak factors, both in theory and in finite samples. We illustrate the use of SPCA by applying it to estimate the risk premia of several tradable and nontradable factors, to evaluate asset managers’ performance, and to de-noise asset pricing factors.
29002.zh_abstract: 在资产定价中，因子模型的估计和检验需要选择一组测试资产。测试资产的选择决定了不同因子风险溢价的可识别程度：如果只有少数资产暴露于某个因子，则该因子是弱的，这会导致标准估计和推断失效。换言之，因子的强度并非其固有属性，而是取决于分析中所使用的横截面。我们提出了一种从测试资产池中选择资产并估计感兴趣因子风险溢价以及整个随机贴现因子的新方法，该方法明确考虑了弱因子和风险暴露高度相关的测试资产。我们将此方法称为监督主成分分析（SPCA），因为它迭代了资产选择步骤和主成分估计步骤。我们给出了估计量的渐近性质，并将其极限行为与近期文献中提出的基于PCA、Ridge、Lasso和偏最小二乘法（PLS）的替代估计量进行了比较。我们发现，无论是在理论上还是在有限样本中，SPCA在存在弱因子的情况下都表现更优。我们通过应用SPCA来估计几个可交易和不可交易因子的风险溢价、评估资产管理者的绩效以及对资产定价因子进行去噪，展示了SPCA的用途。

29001.title: Do Policies to Increase Access to Treatment for Opioid Use Disorder Work?
29001.zh_title: 增加阿片类药物使用障碍治疗可及性的政策有效吗？
29001.authors: Eric Barrette, Leemore Dafny, Karen Shen
29001.abstract: Even among commercially-insured individuals, opioid use disorder (OUD) is undertreated in the U.S.: nearly half receive no treatment within 6 months of a new diagnosis. Using a difference-in-differences specification exploiting the extension of insurance parity requirements for substance disorder treatment to small group enrollees in 2014, we find that parity increases utilization of residential treatment but decreases utilization of agonist medications, the standard of care. We find direct interventions to increase access to medication may be more promising: increases in the county-level share of physicians able to prescribe agonists are associated with substitution toward medication-assisted treatment.
29001.zh_abstract: 即使是在拥有商业保险的个人中，美国对阿片类药物使用障碍（OUD）的治疗也不足：近一半的患者在新诊断后的6个月内未接受任何治疗。我们利用一项双重差分设定，该设定利用了2014年将物质障碍治疗的保险平等要求扩展到小团体参保者的政策，发现平等要求增加了住院治疗的使用，但减少了激动剂药物（标准治疗）的使用。我们发现，直接增加药物可及性的干预措施可能更有前景：县级能够开具激动剂处方的医生比例的增加与向药物辅助治疗的替代相关。

29052.title: A Signal to End Child Marriage: Theory and Experimental Evidence from Bangladesh
29052.zh_title: 终结童婚的信号：来自孟加拉国的理论与实验证据
29052.authors: Nina Buchmann, Erica M. Field, Rachel Glennerster, Shahana Nazneen, Xiao Yu Wang
29052.abstract: Child marriage remains common even where female schooling and employment opportunities have grown. We introduce a signaling model in which bride type is imperfectly observed but preferred types have lower returns to delaying marriage. We show that in this environment the market might pool on early marriage even when everyone would benefit from delay. In this setting, offering a small incentive can delay marriage of all treated types and untreated non-preferred types, while programs that act directly on norms can unintentionally encourage early marriage. We test these theoretical predictions by experimentally evaluating a financial incentive to delay marriage alongside a girls’ empowerment program designed to shift norms. As predicted, girls eligible for the incentive are 19% less likely to marry underage, as are nonpreferred type women ineligible for the incentive. Meanwhile, the empowerment program was successful in promoting more progressive gender norms but failed to decrease adolescent marriage and increased dowry payments.
29052.zh_abstract: 即使在女性教育和就业机会增加的地方，童婚仍然普遍存在。我们引入了一个信号模型，其中新娘类型无法被完美观测，但偏好类型从延迟婚姻中获得的回报较低。我们证明，在这种环境下，即使所有人都能从延迟中受益，市场也可能聚集于早婚。在这种情况下，提供小额激励可以延迟所有受处理类型和未受处理的非偏好类型的婚姻，而直接作用于规范的项目则可能无意中鼓励早婚。我们通过实验评估了一项旨在延迟婚姻的财务激励措施，以及一个旨在转变规范的女孩赋权项目，来检验这些理论预测。正如预测的那样，有资格获得激励的女孩早婚的可能性降低了19%，没有资格获得激励的非偏好类型女性也是如此。与此同时，赋权项目成功地促进了更进步的性别规范，但未能减少青少年婚姻，反而增加了嫁妆支付。

29051.title: Trade Policy
29051.abstract: This chapter reviews a recent body of theoretical and empirical work that studies the normative and positive aspects of trade policy. We start by presenting reduced-form evidence of the eﬀects of trade policy in the presence of supply-chain linkages, on the short-run and persistent eﬀects of trade policy across local labor markets, and on the eﬀects of trade policy uncertainty on employment and ﬁrms. We describe the shift-share method for trade policy analysis, discuss the interpretation of the estimated eﬀects, and provide a theoretical foundation. We then describe new quantitative frameworks, methods, and data used to study the aggregate and distributional eﬀects of trade policy in general equilibrium. We discuss how to take into account supply-chain linkages, local labor markets, and diﬀerent sources of dynamics. As an illustration, we quantify the aggregate and distributional eﬀects of the 2018 trade war between the United States and its trading partners. Finally, we present recent theoretical insights on optimal unilateral trade policy with ﬁrm and product heterogeneity in the context of large and small open economies with perfectly and imperfectly competitive product markets. We also discuss how optimal trade policy is shaped by the presence of multiple sectors, intermediate goods, and supply-chain linkages. We close the chapter by discussing the scope of future research.
29051.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了近期关于贸易政策规范性与实证性方面的理论与实证研究。我们首先展示了在供应链关联存在的情况下，贸易政策对短期及持续性影响的简化形式证据，这些影响涉及地方劳动力市场以及贸易政策不确定性对就业和企业的作用。我们描述了用于贸易政策分析的份额转移方法，讨论了估计效应的解释，并提供了理论基础。随后，我们介绍了用于研究一般均衡中贸易政策总体与分配效应的新量化框架、方法和数据。我们探讨了如何考虑供应链关联、地方劳动力市场以及不同的动态来源。作为示例，我们量化了2018年美国与其贸易伙伴之间贸易战的总体与分配效应。最后，我们提出了在大型和小型开放经济体中，面对完全竞争与不完全竞争产品市场，考虑企业与产品异质性时的最优单边贸易政策的最新理论见解。我们还讨论了多部门、中间品和供应链关联如何影响最优贸易政策。本章结尾探讨了未来研究的范围。
29051.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F1, F10, F11, F12, F13, F14, F15, F16, F19

29050.title: Macroeconomic Misery by Levels of Income in America
29050.zh_title: 美国不同收入水平的宏观经济痛苦指数
29050.abstract: Thirty years of distributional data are used to study the short-term impacts of popular macroeconomic indicators on real household incomes from the poorest to the richest Americans. The appropriate weights on unemployment versus inflation vary across the distribution. The unemployment rate matters at all levels, but especially so for the poorest. Inflation rates matter at middle incomes, though Okun’s famous Misery Index only performs well for the top income groups. GDP growth matters at all levels and proportionately more for the poorest, though only via the unemployment rate. Recessions are poverty-increasing, and skewness-decreasing, but with ambiguous effects on overall inequality.
29050.zh_abstract: 利用三十年的分配数据，研究主流宏观经济指标对从最贫困到最富裕美国居民实际家庭收入的短期影响。失业率与通胀率的适当权重在收入分布中有所不同。失业率对所有收入水平都有影响，但对最贫困群体影响尤为显著。通胀率对中等收入群体有影响，尽管奥肯著名的痛苦指数仅对高收入群体表现良好。GDP增长对所有收入水平都有影响，且对最贫困群体影响比例更大，但这仅通过失业率渠道实现。经济衰退会增加贫困并降低偏度，但对总体不平等的影响不明确。

29049.title: The Damages and Distortions from Discrimination in the Rental Housing Market
29049.zh_title: 租赁住房市场歧视造成的损害与扭曲
29049.abstract: By constraining an individual's choice during a search, housing discrimination distorts sorting decisions away from true preferences and results in a ceteris paribus reduction in welfare. This study combines a large-scale field experiment with a residential sorting model to derive utility-theoretic measures of renter welfare loss associated with the constraints imposed by discrimination in the rental housing market. Results from experiments conducted in five cities show that key neighborhood amenities are associated with higher levels of discrimination. Counterfactual simulations based on the sorting model suggest that discrimination imposes damages equivalent to 4.4% and 3.5% of the annual incomes for African American and Hispanic/LatinX renters, respectively. Damages are increasing in income for African American renters, such that impacts become stronger for economically mobile households. Renters of color must make substantial investments in additional search to mitigate the costs of these constraints. We find that a naive model ignoring discrimination constraints yields biased estimates of willingness to pay for key neighborhood amenities.
29049.zh_abstract: 住房歧视在搜索过程中限制了个人的选择，从而扭曲了基于真实偏好的分类决策，并在其他条件不变的情况下导致福利减少。本研究将大规模实地实验与居住分类模型相结合，推导出与租赁住房市场歧视所施加约束相关的租房者福利损失的效用理论度量。在五个城市进行的实验结果表明，关键社区便利设施与更高水平的歧视相关。基于分类模型的反事实模拟表明，歧视对非裔美国人和西班牙裔/拉丁裔租房者造成的损害分别相当于其年收入的4.4%和3.5%。对于非裔美国人租房者，损害随收入增加而增加，因此对经济流动性较强的家庭影响更大。有色人种租房者必须进行大量额外的搜索投资，以减轻这些约束的成本。我们发现，忽略歧视约束的朴素模型会得出对关键社区便利设施支付意愿的有偏估计。

29048.title: Persuading Investors: A Video-Based Study
29048.zh_title: 说服投资者：一项基于视频的研究
29048.abstract: Persuasive communication functions not only through content but also delivery, e.g., facial expression, tone of voice, and diction. This paper examines the persuasiveness of delivery in start-up pitches. Using machine learning (ML) algorithms to process full pitch videos, we quantify persuasion in visual, vocal, and verbal dimensions. Positive (i.e., passionate, warm) pitches increase funding probability. Yet conditional on funding, high-positivity startups underperform. Women are more heavily judged on delivery when evaluating single-gender teams, but they are neglected when co-pitching with men in mixed-gender teams. Using an experiment, we show persuasion delivery works mainly through leading investors to form inaccurate beliefs.
29048.zh_abstract: 有说服力的沟通不仅通过内容发挥作用，还通过表达方式，例如面部表情、语调以及措辞。本文研究了创业推介中表达方式的说服力。利用机器学习算法处理完整的推介视频，我们在视觉、声音和语言维度上量化了说服力。积极（即充满激情、温暖）的推介会增加融资概率。然而，在获得融资的条件下，高积极性的初创企业表现不佳。在评估单一性别团队时，女性在表达方式上受到更严格的评判，但在混合性别团队中与男性共同推介时，她们则被忽视。通过一项实验，我们表明说服性表达主要通过引导投资者形成不准确的信念来发挥作用。
29048.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：C55, D91, G24, G4, G41

29047.title: Do Urgent Care Centers Reduce Medicare Spending?
29047.zh_title: 紧急护理中心能否减少医疗保险支出？
29047.authors: Janet Currie, Anastasia Karpova, Dan Zeltzer
29047.abstract: We examine the impact of the opening of a new urgent care center (UCC) on health care costs and the utilization of care among nearby Medicare beneficiaries. We focus on 2006–2016, a period of rapid UCC expansion. We find that total Medicare spending rises when residents of a zip code are first served by a UCC, relative to spending in yet-to-be-served zip codes, while mortality remains flat. We explore mechanisms by looking at categories of spending and by examining utilization. Increases in inpatient visits are the largest contributor to the overall increase in spending, rising by 6.65 percent within six years after UCC entry. The number of emergency room visits that result in a hospital admission also increases by 3.7 percent. In contrast, there is no change in the number of ER visits that do not result in admission to hospital, in visits to physicians outside a UCC, or in imaging and tests. Overall, these results provide little evidence that UCCs replace costly ER visits or that they crowd out visits to patients' regular doctors. Instead, the evidence is consistent with the possibility that UCCs—which are increasingly owned by or contract with hospital systems—induce greater spending on hospital care.
29047.zh_abstract: 我们研究了新开设的紧急护理中心对附近医疗保险受益人的医疗成本和服务利用的影响。我们重点关注2006年至2016年这段紧急护理中心快速扩张的时期。我们发现，当一个邮政编码区的居民首次获得紧急护理中心服务时，相对于尚未获得服务的邮政编码区，医疗保险总支出上升，而死亡率保持不变。我们通过考察支出类别和利用情况来探索其机制。住院就诊次数的增加是总支出增加的最大贡献因素，在紧急护理中心进入后的六年内增长了6.65%。导致入院的急诊就诊次数也增加了3.7%。相比之下，未导致入院的急诊就诊次数、紧急护理中心以外的医生就诊次数以及影像和检查次数没有变化。总体而言，这些结果几乎没有证据表明紧急护理中心取代了昂贵的急诊就诊，或者挤出了患者对常规医生的就诊。相反，证据与以下可能性一致：紧急护理中心——越来越多地被医院系统拥有或与之签约——导致了更多的住院护理支出。

29046.title: Growing Pains? A Comment on “Converging to Convergence”
29046.zh_title: 成长的烦恼？对“趋同于收敛”的评论
29046.abstract: Early tests of cross-country convergence found evidence only for conditional convergence. In contrast, with more recent data, Kremer, Willis, and You (2021) find evidence that since the mid-1980s there has been a trend towards unconditional convergence culminating in absolute convergence since 2000. Additionally, they find suggestive evidence that one of the major drivers of this trend is an underlying convergence towards development-favored policies. We discuss the implications of this result through the lens of individual welfare and poverty, concluding that the news is not as welcome as it may seem for the world’s poor. We point out that absolute convergence has happened contemporaneously with rising within-country inequality, resulting in more of the world’s poor living in middle-income countries. Next, we argue that domestic redistribution is essential to spread the benefits from industrialization, since the labor share of manufacturing isn’t reaching the heights it did in industrialized countries. Finally, we argue that the democratic institutions that can facilitate this redistribution themselves face headwinds. Democratic backsliding, the Covid-19 pandemic, and a bleak climate outlook all present obstacles to transforming economic growth into economic justice for the poor.
29046.zh_abstract: 早期的跨国收敛检验仅发现了条件收敛的证据。相比之下，利用更新的数据，Kremer、Willis和You（2021）发现证据表明自20世纪80年代中期以来，存在向无条件收敛的趋势，并最终在2000年后达到绝对收敛。此外，他们发现暗示性证据表明，这一趋势的主要驱动因素之一是向有利于发展的政策的潜在收敛。我们通过个人福利和贫困的视角讨论了这一结果的含义，得出的结论是，对世界贫困人口而言，这一消息并不像看起来那么受欢迎。我们指出，绝对收敛与国内不平等加剧同时发生，导致更多世界贫困人口生活在中等收入国家。其次，我们认为国内再分配对于传播工业化的收益至关重要，因为制造业的劳动力份额并未达到工业化国家曾经的高度。最后，我们认为能够促进这种再分配的民主制度本身也面临阻力。民主倒退、新冠疫情以及黯淡的气候前景，都为将经济增长转化为贫困人口的经济正义设置了障碍。

29045.title: Place-Based Redistribution in Location Choice Models
29045.zh_title: 区位选择模型中的基于地点的再分配
29045.abstract: In recent location choice models, households randomly vary with respect to their utility of living in a location. We demonstrate the distribution generating this randomness is not identifiable from location choice data and the optimal allocation chosen by a social planner is not identified. We propose an algorithm for setting the distribution generating the random utility across locations that implies a planner will optimally choose no redistribution in the absence of externalities or equity motives between different types of people. Our algorithm preserves a planner's motives to redistribute due to equity considerations between types of people and efficiency in production.
29045.zh_abstract: 在最近的区位选择模型中，家庭在居住地效用方面随机变化。我们证明，产生这种随机性的分布无法从区位选择数据中识别，并且社会规划者选择的最优分配也无法识别。我们提出了一种算法，用于设定跨区位产生随机效用的分布，该算法意味着，在没有外部性或不同类型人群之间的公平动机的情况下，规划者将最优地选择不进行再分配。我们的算法保留了规划者因不同类型人群之间的公平考虑以及生产效率而进行再分配的动机。

29044.title: Instrumental Variable Identification of Dynamic Variance Decompositions
29044.zh_title: 动态方差分解的工具变量识别
29044.abstract: Macroeconomists increasingly use external sources of exogenous variation for causal inference. However, unless such external instruments (proxies) capture the underlying shock without measurement error, existing methods are silent on the importance of that shock for macroeconomic fluctuations. We show that, in a general moving average model with external instruments, variance decompositions for the instrumented shock are interval-identified, with informative bounds. Various additional restrictions guarantee point identification of both variance and historical decompositions. Unlike SVAR analysis, our methods do not require invertibility. Applied to U.S. data, they give a tight upper bound on the importance of monetary shocks for inflation dynamics.
29044.zh_abstract: 宏观经济学家越来越多地使用外部来源的外生变异进行因果推断。然而，除非这些外部工具（代理变量）能够无测量误差地捕捉到潜在冲击，否则现有方法无法说明该冲击对宏观经济波动的重要性。我们证明，在一个具有外部工具的一般移动平均模型中，被工具化冲击的方差分解是区间识别的，并具有信息量的界限。各种附加约束保证了方差分解和历史分解的点识别。与SVAR分析不同，我们的方法不需要可逆性。应用于美国数据，我们的方法为货币冲击对通胀动态的重要性提供了一个严格的上界。

29043.title: Centralized Matching with Incomplete Information
29043.zh_title: 不完全信息下的集中匹配
29043.authors: Marcelo A. Fernandez, Kirill Rudov, Leeat Yariv
29043.abstract: We study the impacts of incomplete information on centralized one-to-one matching markets. We focus on the commonly used Deferred Acceptance mechanism (Gale and Shapley, 1962). We show that many complete-information results are fragile to a small infusion of uncertainty about others' preferences.
29043.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不完全信息对集中式一对一匹配市场的影响。我们重点关注常用的延迟接受机制（Gale and Shapley, 1962）。我们表明，许多完全信息下的结果在关于他人偏好的少量不确定性注入下是脆弱的。

29042.title: Communication within Firms: Evidence from CEO Turnovers
29042.zh_title: 企业内部沟通：来自CEO更替的证据
29042.authors: Stephen Michael Impink, Andrea Prat, Raffaella Sadun
29042.abstract: This paper uses novel, firm-level communication measures derived from communications metadata several months before and after a CEO transition for 102 firms to study whether and how this organizational event is reflected in employees’ communication flows. We find that CEO turnover is associated with an initial decrease in intra-firm communication (-10% relative to the pre-CEO transition period), followed by a significant increase approximately five months after the CEO turnover (+33%). The increase in communications is driven primarily by inter-departmental (i.e. communication involving employees of different functional departments) and vertical (i.e. communication among managers and employees) communication flows. Firms where the medium-run increase in communication is higher experience greater increases in market returns and revenues in the year following the CEO transition.
29042.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自102家公司在CEO更替前后几个月的通信元数据得出的新颖的企业层面沟通度量，研究这一组织事件是否以及如何反映在员工的沟通流中。我们发现，CEO更替与企业内部沟通的初始下降相关（相对于CEO更替前时期下降10%），随后在CEO更替后大约五个月出现显著增加（增加33%）。沟通的增加主要由跨部门（即涉及不同职能部门员工的沟通）和纵向（即管理层与员工之间的沟通）沟通流驱动。在CEO更替后的一年中，沟通中期增长较高的企业经历了更大的市场回报和收入增长。

29041.title: The Decline of Drudgery and the Paradox of Hard Work
29041.zh_title: 苦役的衰退与努力工作的悖论
29041.abstract: We develop a theory focusing on general equilibrium and long-run macroeconomic consequences of trends in job utility—the process benefits and costs of work. Given secular increases in job utility, work hours can remain approximately constant over time even if the income effect of higher wages on labor supply exceeds the substitution effect. Secular improvements in job utility can be substantial relative to welfare gains from ordinary technological progress. These two implications are connected by an equation flowing from optimal hours choices: improvements in job utility that have a significant effect on labor supply tend to have large welfare effects.
29041.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个理论，聚焦于工作效用（工作的过程收益和成本）趋势的一般均衡和长期宏观经济后果。给定工作效用的长期增长，即使更高工资对劳动供给的收入效应超过替代效应，工作时间也可以随时间大致保持不变。工作效用的长期改善相对于普通技术进步的福利收益可能是显著的。这两个含义通过一个源于最优工作时间选择的等式联系起来：对劳动供给有显著影响的工作效用改善往往具有较大的福利效应。
29041.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS；JEL：J22, J24, J28, J31, O4

29040.title: Biden, COVID and Mental Health in America
29040.zh_title: 拜登、新冠疫情与美国心理健康
29040.abstract: Using US Census Household Pulse Survey data for the period April 2020 to June 2021 we track the evolution of the mental health of nearly 2.3 million Americans during the COVID pandemic. We find anxiety, depression and worry peaked in November 2020, coinciding with the Presidential election. The taking of prescription drugs for mental health conditions peaked two weeks later in December 2020. Mental health improved subsequently such that by April 2021 it was better than it had been a year previously. The probability of having been diagnosed with COVID did not rise significantly in the first half of 2021 but COVID infection rates were higher among the young than the old. COVID diagnoses were significantly lower in States that had voted for Biden in the Presidential Election. The probability of vaccination rose with age, was considerably higher in Biden states, and rose precipitously over the period among the young and old. Anxiety was higher among people in Biden states, whether they had been diagnosed or not, and whether they were vaccinated or not. The association between anxiety and depression and having had COVID was not significant in Biden or Trump states but being vaccinated was associated with lower anxiety and depression, with the effect being larger in Biden states. Whilst being in paid work was associated with lower anxiety, worry and depression and was associated with higher vaccination rates, it also increased the probability of having had COVID.
29040.zh_abstract: 利用2020年4月至2021年6月期间的美国人口普查家庭脉搏调查数据，我们追踪了近230万美国人在新冠疫情期间心理健康的演变。我们发现，焦虑、抑郁和担忧在2020年11月达到顶峰，与总统选举时间吻合。因心理健康状况服用处方药在两周后的2020年12月达到顶峰。此后心理健康状况有所改善，到2021年4月，情况比一年前更好。在2021年上半年，被诊断出患有新冠的概率并未显著上升，但年轻人的新冠感染率高于老年人。在总统选举中投票给拜登的州，新冠诊断率显著较低。疫苗接种概率随年龄增长而上升，在拜登州显著更高，并且在年轻人和老年人中在此期间急剧上升。在拜登州，无论是否被诊断出新冠，也无论是否接种疫苗，人们的焦虑程度都更高。在拜登州或特朗普州，焦虑和抑郁与曾患新冠之间的关联并不显著，但接种疫苗与较低的焦虑和抑郁相关，且这种效应在拜登州更大。虽然有偿工作与较低的焦虑、担忧和抑郁相关，并与更高的疫苗接种率相关，但它也增加了曾患新冠的概率。

29039.title: The IO of Selection Markets
29039.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Neale Mahoney
29039.abstract: This is an invited chapter for the forthcoming Volume 4 of the Handbook of Industrial Organization. We focus on "selection markets," which cover markets in which consumers vary not only in how much they are willing to pay for a product but also in how costly they are to the seller. The chapter tries to organize the recent wave of IO-related papers on selection markets, which has largely focused on insurance and credit markets. We provide a common framework, terminology, and notation that can be used to understand many of these papers, and that we hope can be usefully applied going forward.
29039.zh_abstract: 这是为即将出版的《产业组织手册》第4卷撰写的一章。我们聚焦于“选择市场”，这类市场的特点是消费者不仅在愿意为产品支付多少上存在差异，而且在他们对卖方的成本高低上也存在差异。本章试图梳理近期关于选择市场的产业组织相关论文，这些论文主要关注保险和信贷市场。我们提供了一个共同的框架、术语和符号，可用于理解这些论文中的许多内容，并希望未来能够有效地应用。
29039.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, DEV, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G22, L00, L13

29038.title: Is Recreational Marijuana a Gateway to Harder Drug Use and Crime?
29038.zh_title: 娱乐性大麻是通往更硬毒品和犯罪的敲门砖吗？
29038.authors: Joseph J. Sabia, Dhaval M. Dave, Fawaz Alotaibi, Daniel I. Rees
29038.abstract: Recreational marijuana laws (RMLs), which legalize the possession of small quantities of marijuana for recreational use, have been adopted by 18 states and the District of Columbia. Opponents argue that RML-induced increases in marijuana consumption will serve as a “gateway” to harder drug use and crime. Using data covering the period 2000-2019 from a variety of national sources (the National Survey of Drug Use and Health, the Uniform Crime Reports, the National Vital Statistics System, and the Treatment Episode Data Set) this study is the first to comprehensively examine the effects of legalizing recreational marijuana on hard drug use, arrests, drug overdose deaths, suicides, and treatment admissions. Our analyses show that RMLs increase adult marijuana use and reduce drug-related arrests over an average post-legalization window of three to four years. There is little evidence to suggest that RML-induced increases in marijuana consumption encourage the use of harder substances or violent criminal activity, and some evidence that RMLs may aid in reducing opioid-related mortality.
29038.zh_abstract: 娱乐性大麻法（RMLs）允许为娱乐目的持有少量大麻，已被18个州和哥伦比亚特区采纳。反对者认为，RML导致的大麻消费增加将成为通往更硬毒品使用和犯罪的“敲门砖”。利用2000-2019年期间来自多个全国性来源（全国药物使用与健康调查、统一犯罪报告、全国生命统计系统和治疗事件数据集）的数据，本研究首次全面考察了娱乐性大麻合法化对硬毒品使用、逮捕、药物过量死亡、自杀和治疗入院的影响。我们的分析表明，在平均三到四年的合法化后窗口期内，RMLs增加了成人使用大麻并减少了与毒品相关的逮捕。几乎没有证据表明RML导致的大麻消费增加会鼓励使用更硬物质或暴力犯罪活动，并且有一些证据表明RMLs可能有助于减少与阿片类药物相关的死亡率。
29038.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I18, K14

29037.title: Do State SNAP Policies Influence Program Participation among Seniors?
29037.zh_title: 州SNAP政策是否影响老年人的项目参与？
29037.authors: Jordan W. Jones, Charles J. Courtemanche, Augustine Denteh, James Marton, Rusty Tchernis
29037.abstract: Senior participation in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) has traditionally been lower than other groups among those eligible, with historical estimates below 50 percent. We examine the impacts of state SNAP policies on program participation among low-income senior (age 60 and older) and non-senior households using data from the 2001-2014 December Current Population Survey Food Security Supplement. Our results suggest that policies designed to expand SNAP eligibility modestly increased participation among seniors but led to larger increases among non-seniors. In contrast, we find little evidence of effects of policies related to transaction costs, stigma, or outreach on either group.
29037.zh_abstract: 在符合条件的群体中，老年人参与补充营养援助计划（SNAP）的比例传统上低于其他群体，历史估计值低于50%。我们利用2001-2014年12月当前人口调查食品安全补充数据，考察了州SNAP政策对低收入老年（60岁及以上）和非老年家庭项目参与的影响。我们的结果表明，旨在扩大SNAP资格的政策适度增加了老年人的参与，但导致非老年人的参与增加更大。相比之下，我们发现与交易成本、污名化或外展相关的政策对这两个群体几乎没有影响。
29037.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：I32, I38, J14, Q18

29036.title: Creating Controversy in Proxy Voting Advice
29036.zh_title: 在代理投票建议中制造争议
29036.authors: Andrey Malenko, Nadya Malenko, Chester S. Spatt
29036.abstract: We analyze the design of recommendations (available to all shareholders) and research reports (available only to subscribers) by a proxy advisor, who maximizes profits from selling information to shareholders. We show that the advisor benefits from biasing its recommendations against the a priori more likely alternative, thereby “creating controversy” for the vote. In contrast, it serves the advisor’s interest to produce precise and unbiased research reports. Our results help reinterpret empirical patterns of shareholders’ voting behavior, suggesting that proxy advisors’ recommendations may not be a suitable benchmark for evaluating shareholders’ votes. Our model also rationalizes the one-size-fits-all approach in recommendations.
29036.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一家代理顾问公司（向所有股东提供建议，仅向订阅者提供研究报告）的设计，该公司通过向股东出售信息来最大化利润。我们表明，顾问公司通过使其建议偏向于先验可能性较低的选项而受益，从而为投票“制造争议”。相比之下，制作精确且无偏见的研究报告符合顾问公司的利益。我们的结果有助于重新解释股东投票行为的经验模式，表明代理顾问的建议可能不是评估股东投票的合适基准。我们的模型也合理化了建议中“一刀切”的方法。

29035.title: Business Groups: Panics, Runs, Organ Banks and Zombie Firms
29035.zh_title: 企业集团：恐慌、挤兑、器官银行与僵尸企业
29035.abstract: Business groups often contain banks or near banks that can protect group firms from economic shocks. A group bank subordinate to other group firms can become an “organ bank” that selflessly bails out distressed group firms and anticipates a government bailout. A group bank subordinating other group firms can extend loans to suppress their risk-taking to default risk, preserving risk-averse low-productivity zombie firms. Actual business groups can fall between these polar cases. Subordinated group banks magnify risk-taking; subordinating banks suppress risk-taking; yet both distortions promote business group firms’ survival. Limiting intragroup income and risk shifting, severing banks from business groups, or dismantling business groups may mitigate both distortions; but also limits business groups’ internal markets, thought important where external markets work poorly.
29035.zh_abstract: 企业集团通常包含银行或类银行机构，这些机构能够保护集团内企业免受经济冲击。一个从属于其他集团企业的集团银行可能成为“器官银行”，无私地救助陷入困境的集团企业，并预期政府会提供救助。一个使其他集团企业从属于自身的集团银行可以发放贷款以抑制其风险承担至违约风险水平，从而保留风险规避的低生产率僵尸企业。实际的企业集团可能介于这两种极端情况之间。从属型集团银行放大了风险承担；主导型银行则抑制了风险承担；然而这两种扭曲都促进了企业集团内企业的生存。限制集团内收入和风险转移、将银行与企业集团分离或解散企业集团，可能缓解这两种扭曲；但也会限制企业集团的内部市场，而内部市场在外部市场运行不佳时被认为至关重要。

29034.title: Financial Dollarization: Efficient Intranational Risk Sharing or Prescription for Disaster?
29034.zh_title: 金融美元化：有效的国内风险分担还是灾难的预兆？
29034.authors: Lawrence Christiano, Hüsnü Dalgic, Armen Nurbekyan
29034.abstract: A large literature focuses on the implications of the dollar for international risk sharing. In contrast, we find evidence that most of the risk sharing associated with the dollar is intranational rather than international. It is sometimes suggested that the insurance benefits of the dollar are undone by an increased risk of financial fragility. We display empirical evidence that this concern is over-stated. We develop a simple model formalizing our findings about the insurance role of the dollar, which is consistent with the key cross-country facts on interest rate differentials, deposit dollarization and exchange rate depreciations in recessions.
29034.zh_abstract: 大量文献关注美元对国际风险分担的影响。相比之下，我们发现证据表明，与美元相关的风险分担大部分是国内而非国际的。有时有人提出，美元的保险收益被金融脆弱性风险的增加所抵消。我们展示的经验证据表明，这种担忧被夸大了。我们开发了一个简单模型，将我们关于美元保险作用的发现形式化，该模型与利率差异、存款美元化和经济衰退时期汇率贬值的关键跨国事实一致。

29033.title: Long-Term Resource Adequacy in Wholesale Electricity Markets with Significant Intermittent Renewables
29033.zh_title: 具有大量间歇性可再生能源的批发电力市场中的长期资源充足性
29033.abstract: Growing amounts of intermittent renewable generation capacity substantially increases the complexity of determining whether sufficient energy will be available to meet hourly demands throughout the year. As the events of August 2020 in California and February 2021 in Texas demonstrate, supply shortfalls can have large economic and public health consequences. An empirical analysis of these two events demonstrates that similar supply shortfalls are likely to occur in the future without a paradigm shift in how long-term resource adequacy is determined for an electricity supply industry with significant intermittent renewables. An alternative approach to determining long-term resource adequacy that explicitly recognizes the characteristics of different generation technologies is outlined and its properties explored relative to current approaches.
29033.zh_abstract: 日益增长的间歇性可再生能源发电容量大大增加了确定全年是否有足够能源满足每小时需求的复杂性。正如2020年8月加利福尼亚州和2021年2月德克萨斯州的事件所表明的那样，供应短缺可能产生巨大的经济和公共卫生后果。对这两起事件的实证分析表明，如果不对如何为具有大量间歇性可再生能源的电力供应行业确定长期资源充足性进行范式转变，类似的供应短缺未来很可能再次发生。本文概述了一种确定长期资源充足性的替代方法，该方法明确承认不同发电技术的特性，并探讨了其相对于当前方法的特性。

29032.title: Business Cycles and Environmental Policy: Literature Review and Policy Implications
29032.zh_title: 经济周期与环境政策：文献综述与政策启示
29032.authors: Barbara Annicchiarico, Stefano Carattini, Carolyn Fischer, Garth Heutel
29032.abstract: We study the relationship between business cycles and the design and effects of environmental policies, particularly those with economy-wide significance like climate policies. First, we provide a brief review of the literature related to this topic, from initial explorations using real business cycle models to New Keynesian extensions, open-economy variations, and issues of monetary policy and financial regulations. Next, we provide a list of the main findings that emerge from this literature that are potentially most relevant to policymakers, including the impacts of policy on volatility and how to design policy to adjust to cycles. Finally, we propose several important remaining research questions.
29032.zh_abstract: 我们研究了经济周期与环境政策（尤其是具有经济全局意义的气候政策）的设计和效果之间的关系。首先，我们简要回顾了与该主题相关的文献，从使用真实经济周期模型的初步探索，到新凯恩斯主义扩展、开放经济变体，以及货币政策和金融监管问题。接下来，我们列出了该文献中得出的、可能对政策制定者最具相关性的主要发现，包括政策对波动性的影响以及如何设计政策以适应周期。最后，我们提出了几个重要的待研究问题。

29031.title: Career Effects of Mental Health
29031.authors: Barbara Biasi, Michael S. Dahl, Petra Moser
29031.abstract: This paper investigates the career effects of mental health, focusing on depression, schizophrenia, and bipolar disorder (BD). Individual-level registry data from Denmark show that these disorders carry large earnings penalties, ranging from 34 percent for depression and 38 percent for BD to 74 percent for schizophrenia. To investigate the causal effects of mental health on a person’s career, we exploit the approval of lithium as a maintenance treatment for BD in 1976. Baseline estimates compare career outcomes for people with and without access in their 20s, the typical age of onset for BD. These estimates show that access to treatment eliminates one third of the earnings penalty associated with BD and greatly reduces the risks of low or no earnings. Importantly, access to treatment closes more than half of the disability risk associated with BD.
29031.zh_abstract: 本文研究了心理健康的职业影响，重点关注抑郁症、精神分裂症和双相情感障碍。来自丹麦的个人层面登记数据显示，这些疾病带来了巨大的收入惩罚，从抑郁症的34%和双相情感障碍的38%到精神分裂症的74%不等。为了调查心理健康对个人职业的因果影响，我们利用了1976年锂作为双相情感障碍维持治疗药物的获批。基线估计比较了在20多岁（双相情感障碍的典型发病年龄）时能否获得治疗的人群的职业结果。这些估计表明，获得治疗消除了与双相情感障碍相关的三分之一的收入惩罚，并大大降低了低收入或无收入的风险。重要的是，获得治疗弥补了与双相情感障碍相关的超过一半的残疾风险。

29030.title: The Evolution from Life Insurance to Financial Engineering
29030.zh_title: 从人寿保险到金融工程的演变
29030.authors: Ralph S. J. Koijen, Motohiro Yogo
29030.abstract: Since the mid-1980s, the share of household net worth intermediated by US ﬁnancial institutions has shifted from deﬁned beneﬁt plans to life insurers and deﬁned contribution plans. Life insurers have primarily grown through variable annuities, which are mutual funds with longevity insurance, a potential tax advantage, and minimum return guarantees. The minimum return guarantees change the primary function of life insurers from traditional insurance to ﬁnancial engineering. Variable annuity insurers are exposed to interest and equity risk mismatch and their stock returns were especially low during the COVID-19 crisis. We consider regulatory changes, such as more detailed ﬁnancial disclosure and standardized stress tests, to monitor potential risk mismatch and to ensure stability of the insurance sector.
29030.zh_abstract: 自20世纪80年代中期以来，由美国金融机构中介的家庭净资产份额已从固定收益计划转向人寿保险公司和固定缴款计划。人寿保险公司主要通过可变年金增长，可变年金是带有长寿保险、潜在税收优势和最低收益保证的共同基金。最低收益保证将人寿保险公司的首要功能从传统保险转变为金融工程。可变年金保险公司面临利率和股权风险错配，其股票回报在COVID-19危机期间尤其低。我们考虑监管变革，例如更详细的财务披露和标准化压力测试，以监控潜在的风险错配并确保保险部门的稳定性。

29029.title: Do Collateral Sanctions Work? Evidence from the IRS’ Passport Certification and Revocation Process
29029.zh_title: 附带制裁有效吗？来自国税局护照认证和撤销程序的证据
29029.authors: Paul R. Organ, Alex Ruda, Joel Slemrod, Alex Turk
29029.abstract: Penalties for tax evasion are typically financial, but many jurisdictions also utilize collateral sanctions that deny access to some government-provided service. To learn about the effectiveness of such penalties, we examine a U.S. policy restricting passport access for taxpayers with substantial tax debt, known as “certification.” We find an immediate and strong positive effect on compliance actions when a passport request is denied. We then take advantage of randomization during the policy rollout to identify the direct compliance effect of certification, and find smaller but non-trivial effects whose heterogeneity is consistent with measures of taxpayers’ value of having a passport.
29029.zh_abstract: 逃税的处罚通常是经济性的，但许多司法管辖区也利用附带制裁，拒绝提供某种政府服务。为了了解此类处罚的有效性，我们研究了一项美国政策，该政策限制有大量税务债务的纳税人使用护照，即所谓的“认证”。我们发现，当护照申请被拒绝时，对合规行为有直接且强烈的正向影响。然后，我们利用政策推广过程中的随机化来识别认证的直接合规效应，并发现了较小但不可忽视的影响，其异质性与纳税人拥有护照价值的衡量指标一致。

29028.title: When Is Tinkering with Safety Net Programs Harmful to Beneficiaries?
29028.zh_title: 何时调整安全网计划对受益者有害？
29028.abstract: Interactions between redistributive policies can confront low-income households with complicated choices. We study one such interaction, namely the relationship between Medicaid eligibility thresholds and the minimum wage. A minimum wage increase reduces the number of hours a low-skilled individual can work while retaining Medicaid eligibility. We show that the empirical and welfare implications of this interaction can depend crucially on the relevance of labor market frictions. Absent frictions, affected workers may maintain Medicaid eligibility through small reductions in hours of work. With frictions, affected workers may lose Medicaid eligibility unless they leave their initial job. Empirically, we find that workers facing this scenario became less likely to participate in Medicaid, less likely to work, and more likely to spend time looking for new jobs, including search while employed. The observed outcomes suggest that low-skilled workers face substantial labor market frictions. Because adjustment is costly, tinkering with safety net program parameters that determine the location of program eligibility notches can be harmful to beneficiaries.
29028.zh_abstract: 再分配政策之间的相互作用可能使低收入家庭面临复杂的选择。我们研究了一种这样的相互作用，即医疗补助资格门槛与最低工资之间的关系。最低工资的提高减少了低技能个人在保持医疗补助资格的同时可以工作的小时数。我们表明，这种相互作用的实证和福利影响可能关键取决于劳动力市场摩擦的相关性。在没有摩擦的情况下，受影响的工人可能通过小幅减少工作时间来维持医疗补助资格。在有摩擦的情况下，受影响的工人可能失去医疗补助资格，除非他们离开最初的工作。实证上，我们发现面临这种情况的工人参与医疗补助的可能性降低，工作的可能性降低，并且更有可能花时间寻找新工作，包括在职搜索。观察到的结果表明，低技能工人面临巨大的劳动力市场摩擦。由于调整成本高昂，调整决定计划资格门槛位置的安全网计划参数可能对受益者有害。

29027.title: Household Financial Transaction Data
29027.abstract: The growth of the availability and use of detailed household financial transaction microdata has dramatically expanded the ability of researchers to understand both household decision-making as well as aggregate fluctuations across a wide range of fields. This class of transaction data is derived from a myriad of sources including financial institutions, FinTech apps, and payment intermediaries. We review how these detailed data have been utilized in finance and economics research and the benefits they enable beyond more traditional measures of income, spending, and wealth. We discuss the future potential for this flexible class of data in firm-focused research, real-time policy analysis, and macro statistics.
29027.zh_abstract: 详细家庭金融交易微观数据的可用性和使用量的增长，极大地扩展了研究人员理解家庭决策以及跨广泛领域的总体波动的能力。这类交易数据来源于多种渠道，包括金融机构、金融科技应用程序和支付中介。我们回顾了这些详细数据如何在金融和经济学研究中被利用，以及它们相对于传统的收入、支出和财富衡量标准所带来的优势。我们讨论了这类灵活数据在企业重点研究、实时政策分析和宏观统计中的未来潜力。
29027.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PE；JEL：C81, D14, G5, H31

29026.title: Geopolitics and International Trade Infrastructure
29026.zh_title: 地缘政治与国际贸易基础设施
29026.authors: Sebastian Galiani, José Manuel Paz y Miño, Gustavo Torrens
29026.abstract: We develop a simple (incumbent versus entrant) strategic deterrence model to study the economic and geopolitical interactions underlying a strategic international activity, such as trade-related infrastructure projects like the Panama Canal. We study the incentives for global geopolitical players to support allied satellite countries where the strategic activity takes place or could potentially be initiated. We show that even if no effective competitor emerges, the appearance of a geopolitical challenger capable of credibly supporting the entrant has a pro-competition economic effect which benefits consumers all over the world. Thus, we provide a mechanism through which geopolitical rivalry between global powers leads to better economic outcomes for the global economy (i.e., less market power in the provision of international trade-related infrastructure). This contrasts with previous research on politics and market power which emphasizes the negative effects of political interference as well as research on international relations which often highlights the negative global effects of rising geopolitical tensions between an established power and a emerging challenger.
29026.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简单的（在位者与进入者）战略威慑模型，以研究支撑战略性国际活动（如巴拿马运河等贸易相关基础设施项目）的经济和地缘政治互动。我们研究了全球地缘政治参与者支持其盟友卫星国（这些国家是战略活动发生地或可能启动地）的激励。我们表明，即使没有有效的竞争者出现，一个能够可信地支持进入者的地缘政治挑战者的出现，也会产生有利于竞争的经济效应，使全球消费者受益。因此，我们提供了一个机制，通过该机制，全球大国之间的地缘政治竞争为全球经济带来更好的经济结果（即在提供国际贸易相关基础设施方面减少市场力量）。这与先前关于政治与市场力量的研究（强调政治干预的负面影响）以及国际关系研究（通常强调现有大国与新兴挑战者之间地缘政治紧张局势升级对全球的负面影响）形成对比。

29025.title: Unobserved Heterogeneity, State Dependence, and Health Plan Choices
29025.zh_title: 未观测到的异质性、状态依赖性与健康保险计划选择
29025.authors: Ariel Pakes, Jack R. Porter, Mark Shepard, Sophie Calder-Wang
29025.abstract: We provide a new method to analyze discrete choice models with state dependence and individual-by-product fixed effects, and use it to analyze consumer choices in the policy-relevant environment of a subsidized health insurance exchange. Moment inequalities are used to distinguish state dependence from consumers’ switching choices in response to changes in product attributes. We infer much smaller switching costs on the health insurance exchange than is inferred from standard logit and/or random effects methods. A counterfactual policy evaluation illustrates that the policy implications of this difference can be substantive.
29025.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一种新方法来分析具有状态依赖性和个体-产品固定效应的离散选择模型，并用它来分析消费者在政策相关的补贴健康保险交易所环境中的选择。我们使用矩不等式来区分状态依赖性与消费者因产品属性变化而做出的转换选择。我们推断出健康保险交易所的转换成本远低于标准Logit和/或随机效应方法所推断的结果。一项反事实政策评估表明，这种差异的政策含义可能是实质性的。
29025.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：C13, D12, I11, L60, M31

29024.title: You Can’t Handle The Truth: The Effects Of The Post-9/11 Gi Bill On Higher Education And Earnings
29024.zh_title: 你无法承受真相：9/11后《退伍军人权利法案》对高等教育和收入的影响
29024.authors: Andrew Barr, Laura Kawano, Bruce Sacerdote, William Skimmyhorn, Michael Stevens
29024.abstract: The Post 9/11 GI Bill (PGIB) is among the largest and most generous college subsidies enacted thus far in the U.S. We examine the impact of the PGIB on veterans’ college-going, degree completion, federal education tax benefit utilization, and long run earnings. Among veterans potentially induced to enroll, the introduction of the PGIB raised college enrollment by 0.17 years and B.A. completion by 1.2 percentage points (on a base of 9 percent). But, the PGIB reduced average annual earnings nine years after separation from the Army by $\$900$ (on a base of $\$32,000$). Years enrolled effects are larger and earnings effects more negative for veterans with lower AFQT scores and those who were less occupationally skilled. Under a variety of conservative assumptions, veterans are unlikely to recoup these reduced earnings during their working careers. All veterans who were already enrolled in college at the time of bill passage increase their months of schooling, but only for those in public institutions did this translate into increases in bachelor’s degree attainment and longer-run earnings. For specific groups of students, large subsidies can modestly help degree completion but harm long run earnings due to lost labor market experience.
29024.zh_abstract: 9/11后《退伍军人权利法案》（PGIB）是美国迄今为止颁布的最大、最慷慨的大学补贴之一。我们研究了PGIB对退伍军人大学入学、学位完成、联邦教育税收优惠利用以及长期收入的影响。在可能被诱导入学的退伍军人中，PGIB的引入使大学入学率提高了0.17年，学士学位完成率提高了1.2个百分点（基数为9%）。但是，PGIB使退伍军人从陆军退役九年后的平均年收入减少了900美元（基数为32,000美元）。对于AFQT分数较低和职业技能较低的退伍军人，入学年限效应更大，收入效应更负面。在各种保守假设下，退伍军人不太可能在其职业生涯中弥补这些减少的收入。所有在法案通过时已入学的退伍军人都增加了在校月数，但只有公立院校的退伍军人将其转化为学士学位获得率和长期收入的增加。对于特定学生群体，大额补贴可以适度帮助学位完成，但由于失去劳动力市场经验，会损害长期收入。
29024.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I26, J0, J01, J24, J38

29023.title: Regulated Revenues and Hospital Behavior: Evidence from a Medicare Overhaul
29023.zh_title: 受监管收入与医院行为：来自医疗保险改革的证据
29023.authors: Tal Gross, Adam Sacarny, Maggie Shi, David Silver
29023.abstract: We study a 2008 policy reform in which Medicare revised its hospital payment system to better reflect patients' severity of illness. We construct a simulated instrument that predicts a hospital's policy-induced change in reimbursement using pre-reform patients and post-reform rules. The reform led to large persistent changes in Medicare payment rates across hospitals. Hospitals that faced larger gains in Medicare reimbursement increased the volume of Medicare patients they treated. The estimates imply a volume elasticity of 1.2. To accommodate greater volume, hospitals increased nurse employment, but also lowered length of stay, with ambiguous effects on quality.
29023.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2008年的一项政策改革，其中医疗保险修订了其医院支付系统，以更好地反映患者的疾病严重程度。我们构建了一个模拟工具变量，利用改革前的患者和改革后的规则来预测医院因政策引起的报销变化。该改革导致不同医院之间医疗保险支付率发生了巨大且持续的变化。面临医疗保险报销增长更大的医院增加了其治疗的医疗保险患者数量。估计结果显示出1.2的数量弹性。为了容纳更大的患者数量，医院增加了护士雇佣，但也缩短了住院时间，这对质量产生了不确定的影响。

29022.title: Task-Based Discrimination
29022.authors: Erik Hurst, Yona Rubinstein, Kazuatsu Shimizu
29022.abstract: Why did the Black-White wage gap converge from 1960 to 1980 and why has it stagnated since? To answer this question, we introduce a unified model that integrates notions of both taste-based and statistical discrimination into a task-based model of occupational sorting. At the heart of our framework is the idea that discrimination varies by the task requirement of each job. We use this framework to identify and quantify the role of trends in race-specific factors and changing task prices in explaining the evolution of the Black-White wage gap since 1960. In doing so, we highlight a new task measure - Contact tasks – which measures the extent to which individuals interact with others as part of their job. We provide evidence that changes in the racial gap in Contact tasks serves as a good proxy for changes in taste-based discrimination over time. We find that taste-based discrimination has fallen and racial skill gaps have narrowed over the last sixty years in the United States. However, since the 1980s, the effect of declining racial skill gaps and discrimination on the Black-White wage gap were offset by the increasing returns to Abstract tasks which, on average, favored White workers relative to Black workers.
29022.zh_abstract: 为什么黑人与白人之间的工资差距在1960年至1980年间趋于收敛，而此后却停滞不前？为了回答这个问题，我们引入了一个统一模型，将基于偏好的歧视和统计歧视的概念整合到一个基于任务的职业分类模型中。我们框架的核心是，歧视因每项工作的任务要求而异。我们利用这个框架来识别和量化种族特定因素趋势和变化的任务价格在解释自1960年以来黑人与白人工资差距演变中的作用。在此过程中，我们强调了一个新的任务衡量指标——接触性任务，它衡量了个体在工作中与他人互动的程度。我们提供的证据表明，接触性任务种族差距的变化可以作为随时间变化的基于偏好的歧视的良好代理变量。我们发现，在过去六十年中，美国的基于偏好的歧视有所下降，种族技能差距有所缩小。然而，自1980年代以来，种族技能差距缩小和歧视减少对黑人与白人工资差距的影响，被抽象任务回报率的增加所抵消，而抽象任务总体上更有利于白人工人而非黑人工人。

29021.title: Doctors' and Nurses' Social Media Ads Reduced Holiday Travel and COVID-19 Infections: A Cluster Randomized Controlled Trial
29021.zh_title: 医生和护士的社交媒体广告减少了假日旅行和COVID-19感染：一项整群随机对照试验
29021.authors: Emily Breza, Fatima Cody Stanford, Marcella Alsan, Burak Alsan, Abhijit Banerjee, Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Sarah Eichmeyer, Traci Glushko, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Kelly Holland, Emily Hoppe, Mohit Karnani, Sarah Liegl, Tristan Loisel, Lucy Ogbu-Nwobodo, Benjamin A. Olken, Carlos Torres, Pierre-Luc Vautrey, Erica Warner, Susan Wootton, Esther Duflo
29021.abstract: During the COVID-19 epidemic, many health professionals started using mass communication on social media to relay critical information and persuade individuals to adopt preventative health behaviors. Our group of clinicians and nurses developed and recorded short video messages to encourage viewers to stay home for the Thanksgiving and Christmas Holidays. We then conducted a two-stage clustered randomized controlled trial in 820 counties (covering 13\nStates) in the United States of a large-scale Facebook ad campaign disseminating these messages. In the first level of randomization, we randomly divided the counties into two groups: high intensity and low intensity. In the second level, we randomly assigned zip codes to either treatment or control such that 75% of zip codes in high intensity counties received the treatment, while 25% of zip codes in low intensity counties received the treatment. In each treated zip code, we sent the ad to as many Facebook subscribers as possible (11,954,109 users received at least one ad at Thanksgiving and 23,302,290 users received at least one ad at Christmas). The first primary outcome was aggregate holiday travel, measured using mobile phone location data, available at the county level: we find that average distance travelled in high-intensity counties changed by -0.993 percentage points (95% CI -1.616, -0.371, p-value 0.002) the three days before each holiday. The second primary outcome was COVID-19 infection at the zip-code level: COVID-19 infections recorded in the two-week period starting five days post-holiday declined by 3.5 percent (adjusted 95% CI [-6.2 percent, -0.7 percent], p-value 0.013) in intervention zip codes compared to control zip codes.
29021.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情期间，许多卫生专业人员开始在社交媒体上进行大众传播，以传递关键信息并说服个人采取预防性健康行为。我们的临床医生和护士团队开发并录制了简短视频信息，鼓励观众在感恩节和圣诞节假期留在家中。随后，我们在美国820个县（覆盖13个州）进行了一项两阶段整群随机对照试验，开展大规模Facebook广告活动以传播这些信息。在第一个随机化层级，我们将县随机分为两组：高强度组和低强度组。在第二个层级，我们将邮政编码随机分配到处理组或对照组，使得高强度县中75%的邮政编码接受处理，而低强度县中25%的邮政编码接受处理。在每个处理过的邮政编码中，我们尽可能多地向Facebook用户发送广告（感恩节期间有11,954,109名用户至少收到一条广告，圣诞节期间有23,302,290名用户至少收到一条广告）。第一个主要结果是总体假日旅行，使用县级手机位置数据衡量：我们发现，在每个节日前三天，高强度县的平均旅行距离变化了-0.993个百分点（95%置信区间 -1.616, -0.371，p值 0.002）。第二个主要结果是邮政编码层面的COVID-19感染：与对照组邮政编码相比，干预组邮政编码在节后五天开始的两周内记录的COVID-19感染下降了3.5%（调整后95%置信区间 [-6.2%, -0.7%]，p值 0.013）。

29020.title: The Revealed Demand for Hard vs. Soft News: Evidence from Italian TV Viewership
29020.zh_title: 硬新闻与软新闻的揭示性需求：来自意大利电视收视率的证据
29020.authors: Marco Gambaro, Valentino Larcinese, Riccardo Puglisi, James M. Snyder Jr.
29020.abstract: We analyze minute-by-minute, individual level data on viewership for Italian TV news broadcasts (from AUDITEL™), matched with detailed data on content (from Osservatorio di Pavia). We are interested in the behavior of viewers, and in particular in their decision to switch away from a news program as a function of the type of story they are currently watching. Somewhat surprisingly, we find that “soft” news systematically induces viewers to switch away, even more than “hard” news. On the other hand, sensational stories about crime, accidents and disasters are associated with less switching. We also find significant differences in this switching behavior according to gender, age, and the specific TV channel being watched. For example, young people are relatively more likely to switch away from hard news than soft news, compared to older people.
29020.zh_abstract: 我们分析了意大利电视新闻广播的逐分钟、个体层面收视率数据（来自AUDITEL™），并与详细的内容数据（来自帕维亚观察站）进行了匹配。我们关注观众的行为，特别是他们根据当前观看的新闻故事类型而切换离开新闻节目的决定。有点令人惊讶的是，我们发现“软”新闻系统性地促使观众切换离开，甚至比“硬”新闻更甚。另一方面，关于犯罪、事故和灾难的耸人听闻的故事与较少的切换行为相关。我们还发现，这种切换行为在性别、年龄和所观看的具体电视频道方面存在显著差异。例如，与老年人相比，年轻人相对更可能从硬新闻切换离开，而不是从软新闻切换离开。

29086.title: Money or Power? Financial Infrastructure and Optimal Policy
29086.zh_title: 金钱还是权力？金融基础设施与最优政策
29086.authors: Susanna B. Berkouwer, Pierre E. Biscaye, Eric Hsu, Oliver W. Kim, Kenneth Lee, Edward Miguel, Catherine Wolfram
29086.abstract: In response to the Covid-19 crisis, 186 countries implemented direct cash transfers to households, and 181 introduced in-kind programs that lowered the cost of utilities such as electricity, water, transport, and mobile money. Do cash or in-kind transfers generate greater welfare improvements? And, does a country’s financial infrastructure affect optimal aid disbursement? Through a parallel set of surveys in two urban regions in Africa—with comparable education, cell phone ownership, and electricity connectivity—we show that optimal government aid disbursement hinges on financial infrastructure. In line with economic theory favoring direct cash transfers, in a randomized experiment in Kenya 95% of urban recipients prefer mobile money over electricity transfers of a similar monetary value. But Kenya is an outlier with high mobile money adoption: this increases its value and reduces transaction costs of buying electricity credit. By contrast, in Ghana—where mobile money is less widespread and the transaction costs for buying electricity are higher—half of recipients prefer electricity transfers, and many are willing to forego significant value to receive electricity instead of mobile money. These results have several important policy implications. First, the optimal government policy in response to an economic crisis is not uniform: cash and in-kind transfers have different advantages that make each suitable for specific contexts. Second, the adoption of modern financial technologies will likely increase the efficiency of government cash transfer programs, even as in-kind transfers continue to be preferred in settings where mobile money uptake is slow. Finally, giving recipients a choice harnesses valuable local information that a policy maker may not have access to.
