29086.zh_abstract: 为应对新冠疫情危机，186个国家实施了直接现金转移支付给家庭，181个国家推出了降低电力、水、交通和移动货币等公用事业成本的在实物计划。现金转移还是在实物转移能带来更大的福利改善？一个国家的金融基础设施是否影响最优援助发放？通过在非洲两个城市地区（教育水平、手机拥有率和电力连接率相当）进行的一系列平行调查，我们表明最优政府援助发放取决于金融基础设施。与支持直接现金转移的经济理论一致，在肯尼亚的一项随机实验中，95%的城市接受者更喜欢移动货币而非同等货币价值的电力转移。但肯尼亚是一个移动货币采用率高的异常值：这增加了其价值并降低了购买电力信用的交易成本。相比之下，在加纳——移动货币不那么普及且购买电力的交易成本更高——一半的接受者更喜欢电力转移，许多人愿意放弃显著价值来获得电力而非移动货币。这些结果具有几个重要的政策含义。首先，应对经济危机的最优政府政策并非统一：现金和在实物转移各有优势，使其适用于特定情境。其次，现代金融技术的采用可能会提高政府现金转移计划的效率，即使在移动货币采用缓慢的环境中，在实物转移仍可能更受青睐。最后，给予接受者选择权，可以利用政策制定者可能无法获得的有价值的地方信息。

29085.title: The Real Channel for Nominal Bond-Stock Puzzles
29085.zh_title: 名义债券-股票谜题的实际渠道
29085.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Lars A. Lochstoer, Dongho Song
29085.abstract: We present evidence that the nature of aggregate consumption dynamics change around the time the bond-stock correlation switches sign. We identify three regimes in a real-time, sequential learning framework: two highly persistent regimes where either permanent or transitory consumption shocks are relatively more dominant, and a disaster regime that is largely transitory. We study implications of this finding for asset prices. The transition from the second to the first regime in the late 1990s makes the correlation between equities and real bonds switch sign from positive to negative as in the data, thus providing an explanation for this fact from the perspective of real consumption dynamics. The findings extend to the international setting.
29085.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，总消费动态的性质在债券-股票相关性符号转变时发生变化。我们在一个实时、序贯学习框架中识别出三种机制：两种高度持久的机制，其中永久性或暂时性消费冲击相对更占主导地位，以及一种主要是暂时性的灾难机制。我们研究了这一发现对资产价格的影响。从第二种机制到第一种机制的转变发生在1990年代末，使得股票与实际债券之间的相关性从正变为负，正如数据所示，从而从实际消费动态的角度为这一事实提供了解释。这些发现也适用于国际环境。

29084.title: Propagation and Amplification of Local Productivity Spillovers
29084.zh_title: 本地生产力溢出效应的传播与放大
29084.authors: Xavier Giroud, Simone Lenzu, Quinn Maingi, Holger Mueller
29084.abstract: This paper shows that local productivity spillovers propagate throughout the economy through the plant-level networks of multi-region firms. Using confidential Census plant-level data, we show that large manufacturing plant openings not only raise the productivity of local plants but also of distant plants hundreds of miles away, which belong to multi-region firms that are exposed to the local productivity spillover through one of their plants. To quantify the significance of plant-level networks for the propagation and amplification of local productivity shocks, we develop and estimate a quantitative spatial model in which plants of multi-region firms are linked through shared knowledge. Our model features heterogeneous regions, which interact through goods trade and labor markets, as well as within-location, across-plant heterogeneity in productivity, wages, and employment. Counterfactual exercises show that while knowledge sharing through plant-level networks amplifies the aggregate effects of local productivity shocks, it widens economic disparities between individual workers and regions in the economy.
29084.zh_abstract: 本文表明，本地生产力溢出效应通过多区域企业的工厂级网络在整个经济中传播。利用保密的普查工厂级数据，我们发现大型制造业工厂的开设不仅提高了本地工厂的生产力，还提高了数百英里外远方工厂的生产力，这些远方工厂属于那些通过其一家工厂受到本地生产力溢出效应影响的多区域企业。为了量化工厂级网络对本地生产力冲击传播与放大的重要性，我们开发并估计了一个定量空间模型，在该模型中，多区域企业的工厂通过共享知识相互联系。我们的模型以异质性区域为特征，这些区域通过商品贸易和劳动力市场相互作用，并且在同一地点内，不同工厂在生产力、工资和就业方面存在异质性。反事实分析表明，虽然通过工厂级网络的知识共享放大了本地生产力冲击的总体效应，但它也加剧了经济中个体工人和区域之间的经济差距。
29084.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：C51, C68, E23, E24, L23, O4, R12, R13, R3

29083.title: The Impact of Covid-19 on Older Workers' Employment and Social Security Spillovers
29083.zh_title: 新冠疫情对老年工人就业及社会保障溢出效应的影响
29083.authors: Gopi Shah Goda, Emilie Jackson, Lauren Hersch Nicholas, Sarah See Stith
29083.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic and associated mitigation strategies exacted a large economic toll on large portions of the United States population. For older and disabled workers, the effects could be more persistent and fiscally costly than the impacts experienced by young, healthy workers due to the spillovers onto Social Security. We use Current Population Survey, Social Security administrative data on applications for retirement and disability benefits, and Google Trends data to assess the impact of COVID-19 on older adults age 50-70. We find that employment for this group dropped substantially more than would have been predicted prior to the pandemic: employment for 50-61 year olds was 5.7 pp (8.3 percent) lower, while employment for 62-70-year- olds was 3.9 pp (10.7 percent) lower. For people aged 50-61, unemployment and labor force exits due to reasons other than disability and retirement represented 63 and 30 percent of the employment decline, respectively. For those aged 62-70, the two largest components of the reduction were unemployment (50 percent) and retirement-driven labor force exits (30 percent). We find evidence of declines in reporting a labor force exit due to disability (4-5 percent), applications for disability insurance (15 percent), and Google search intensity for disability (7 percent). Retirement benefit claiming remains largely unchanged overall, though we find evidence that applicants substituted towards filing for benefits via the internet. We explore potential mechanisms and find evidence for both supply- and demand-side explanations.
29083.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情及其相关的缓解策略对美国大部分人口造成了巨大的经济负担。对于老年和残疾工人而言，由于对社会保障的溢出效应，其影响可能比年轻健康工人所经历的影响更持久且财政成本更高。我们利用当前人口调查、社会保障管理局关于退休和残疾福利申请的行政数据以及谷歌趋势数据，评估新冠疫情对50-70岁老年人的影响。我们发现，该群体的就业率下降幅度远大于疫情前的预测：50-61岁人群的就业率下降了5.7个百分点（8.3%），而62-70岁人群的就业率下降了3.9个百分点（10.7%）。对于50-61岁人群，因残疾和退休以外原因导致的失业和退出劳动力市场分别占就业下降的63%和30%。对于62-70岁人群，就业减少的两个最大组成部分是失业（50%）和退休驱动的劳动力市场退出（30%）。我们发现有证据表明，因残疾而退出劳动力市场的报告减少了4-5%，残疾保险申请减少了15%，谷歌上对残疾的搜索强度下降了7%。退休福利申领总体上基本保持不变，但我们发现有证据表明，申请人转向通过互联网提交福利申请。我们探讨了潜在机制，并找到了供给侧和需求侧解释的证据。
29083.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H53, H55, J22, J23, J26

29082.title: Currency Management by International Fixed Income Mutual Funds
29082.zh_title: 国际固定收益共同基金的货币管理
29082.abstract: Investments in international fixed income securities are exposed to significant currency risks. We collect novel data on mutual fund currency derivatives and document that around 90% of U.S. international fixed income funds use currency forwards to manage their foreign exchange exposure. Funds' currency forward positions differ substantially based on risk management demands related to portfolio currency exposures, return-enhancement motives such as currency momentum and carry trade, and strategic considerations related to past performance and fund clienteles. Funds that hedge their currency risk exhibit lower return variability, but do not generate inferior abnormal returns.
29082.zh_abstract: 对国际固定收益证券的投资面临显著的货币风险。我们收集了关于共同基金货币衍生品的新数据，并记录到大约90%的美国国际固定收益基金使用货币远期合约来管理其外汇风险敞口。基金的货币远期头寸因多种因素而存在显著差异，这些因素包括与投资组合货币风险敞口相关的风险管理需求、货币动量和套利交易等增强收益的动机，以及与过往业绩和基金客户群体相关的战略考量。对冲货币风险的基金表现出较低的回报波动性，但并未产生较差的异常回报。
29082.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F21, F31, F34, G11, G12, G13, G15, G23, G32

29081.title: Treasury Richness
29081.abstract: It is widely believed that Treasuries trade at premium prices because of their safety and money-like properties. In reality, this is only true on a relative basis when compared to other bonds, but is often not true on an absolute basis. Many Treasuries have repeatedly traded at substantial discounts to their intrinsic fair values for extended periods during the past 25 years. Since 2015, Treasuries have consistently been priced at an aggregate discount of $\$100$ to $\$300$ billion below their fair values. Treasuries often actually become cheaper following crises. These results provide new perspectives on safe-asset theories.
29081.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认为，由于国债的安全性和类似货币的特性，其交易价格存在溢价。实际上，这仅在与其他债券相对比较时才成立，但在绝对意义上往往不成立。在过去25年中，许多国债曾多次在较长时期内以远低于其内在公允价值的折价进行交易。自2015年以来，国债的总折价一直稳定在其公允价值以下1000亿至3000亿美元之间。危机过后，国债往往实际上变得更便宜。这些结果为安全资产理论提供了新的视角。

29080.title: Consumer Responses to Firms’ Voluntary Disclosure of Information: Evidence from Calorie Labeling by Starbucks
29080.zh_title: 消费者对企业自愿披露信息的反应：来自星巴克标注卡路里的证据
29080.authors: Rosemary Avery, John Cawley, Julia Eddelbuettel, Matthew D. Eisenberg, Charlie Mann, Alan D. Mathios
29080.abstract: This paper estimates the impact on consumer behavior of a firm’s voluntary disclosure of information. Specifically, we study the impact of Starbucks’ disclosure of calorie information on its menu boards in June 2013. Using data on over 250,000 consumers’ visits to specific restaurant chains, we estimate difference-in-difference models that compare the change in the probability that consumers recently visited Starbucks to the change in the probability that they recently visited a similar chain that did not voluntarily disclose: Dunkin Donuts. Estimates from difference-in-differences models indicate that we cannot reject the null hypothesis that Starbucks’ disclosure of calorie information had no impact on the probability that consumers patronized Starbucks in the past month. However, we find evidence of a transitory negative impact on the probability of visits the first year after disclosure, and evidence that disclosure reduced the probability of visits by men. These results are useful for understanding how consumers respond to the voluntary disclosure of information, a decision faced by many firms.
29080.zh_abstract: 本文估计了企业自愿披露信息对消费者行为的影响。具体而言，我们研究了星巴克于2013年6月在其菜单板上披露卡路里信息的影响。利用超过25万名消费者访问特定连锁餐厅的数据，我们估计了双重差分模型，比较了消费者近期访问星巴克的概率变化与近期访问一家未自愿披露信息的类似连锁店——唐恩都乐的概率变化。双重差分模型的估计结果表明，我们无法拒绝原假设，即星巴克披露卡路里信息对消费者在过去一个月内光顾星巴克的概率没有影响。然而，我们发现有证据表明，在信息披露后的第一年，其对访问概率产生了短暂的负面影响，并且信息披露降低了男性访问的概率。这些结果有助于理解消费者如何响应企业自愿披露信息这一许多企业面临的决定。
29080.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, PE；JEL：D22, D8, I12, L2, L83

29079.title: Long Run Effects of Aid: Forecasts and Evidence from Sierra Leone
29079.zh_title: 援助的长期效应：来自塞拉利昂的预测与证据
29079.authors: Katherine Casey, Rachel Glennerster, Edward Miguel, Maarten J. Voors
29079.abstract: We evaluate the long-run effects of a decentralized approach to economic development, called community driven development (CDD), a prominent strategy for delivering foreign aid. Notably we revisit a randomized CDD program in Sierra Leone 11 years after launch. We estimate large persistent gains in local public goods and market activity, and modest positive effects on institutions. There is suggestive evidence that CDD slightly improved communities’ response to the 2014 Ebola epidemic. We compare estimates to the forecasts of experts from Sierra Leone and abroad, working in policy and academia, and find that local policymakers are overly optimistic about CDD’s effectiveness.
29079.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一种名为社区驱动发展（CDD）的分散式经济发展方法的长期效应，这是提供外国援助的一项重要战略。值得注意的是，我们在项目启动11年后重新审视了塞拉利昂的一个随机化CDD项目。我们估计，该项目在地方公共产品和市场活动方面带来了巨大且持久的收益，并对制度产生了适度的积极影响。有提示性证据表明，CDD略微改善了社区对2014年埃博拉疫情的应对能力。我们将估计结果与来自塞拉利昂和国外、从事政策工作和学术研究的专家的预测进行了比较，发现地方政策制定者对CDD的有效性过于乐观。

29078.title: A Unified Theory of Cities
29078.authors: Jacques-François Thisse, Matthew Turner, Philip Ushchev
29078.abstract: How do people arrange themselves when they are free to choose work and residence locations, when commuting is costly, and when increasing returns may affect production? We consider this problem when the location set is discrete and households have heterogenous preferences over workplace-residence pairs. We provide a general characterization of equilibrium throughout the parameter space. The introduction of preference heterogeneity into an otherwise conventional urban model fundamentally changes equilibrium behavior. Multiple equilibria are pervasive although stable equilibria need not exist. Stronger increasing returns to scale need not concentrate economic activity and lower commuting costs need not disperse it. The qualitative behavior of the model as returns to scale increase accords with changes in the patterns of urbanization observed in the Western world between the pre-industrial period and the present.
29078.zh_abstract: 当人们可以自由选择工作和居住地点、通勤成本高昂且规模报酬递增可能影响生产时，他们如何安排自己？我们在地点集是离散的且家庭对工作-居住地配对具有异质性偏好的情况下考虑这个问题。我们提供了整个参数空间中均衡的一般性刻画。将偏好异质性引入一个原本传统的城市模型，从根本上改变了均衡行为。多重均衡普遍存在，尽管稳定均衡不一定存在。更强的规模报酬递增不一定会集中经济活动，而较低的通勤成本也不一定会分散经济活动。随着规模报酬的增加，模型的定性行为与西方世界从前工业时期至今观察到的城市化模式变化相一致。

29077.title: Experimentally Validating Welfare Evaluation of School Vouchers: Part I
29077.zh_title: 实验验证学校代金券的福利评估：第一部分
29077.authors: Peter Arcidiacono, Karthik Muralidharan, Eun-young Shim, John D. Singleton
29077.abstract: In this paper, we use a unique two-stage experiment that randomized access to school vouchers across both markets and students in rural India to estimate the revealed preference value of school choice. In the first step of the research design, we develop an empirical model of school choice subject to liquidity and credit constraints that is estimated using data from only the control markets. Based on this exercise, we estimate that the voucher generated welfare gains exceeding four times the average private school's annual tuition on average to the students induced into private schooling. The second step of the research design will validate the estimated welfare impacts by comparing model predictions for a simulated voucher program in control markets with the data from the treatment group. The results in this paper are based on the first step (using only control data) and this draft serves as a pre-commitment to the model estimates and predictions before examining the experimental data.
29077.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用印度农村地区一个独特的两阶段实验，该实验在市场和学生两个层面随机分配学校代金券的获取机会，以估计学校选择的显示性偏好价值。在研究设计的第一步，我们开发了一个受流动性和信贷约束影响的学校选择实证模型，该模型仅使用来自控制市场的数据进行估计。基于此分析，我们估计，对于被诱导进入私立学校的学生而言，代金券平均产生了超过私立学校年均学费四倍的福利收益。研究设计的第二步将通过将控制市场中模拟代金券项目的模型预测与处理组的数据进行比较，来验证估计的福利影响。本文的结果基于第一步（仅使用控制数据），本稿作为在检验实验数据之前对模型估计和预测的预先承诺。
29077.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, IO, PE；JEL：D12, H42, I21, I28, O15

29076.title: Selling Fast and Buying Slow: Heuristics and Trading Performance of Institutional Investors
29076.zh_title: 快速卖出与缓慢买入：机构投资者的启发式行为与交易绩效
29076.authors: Klakow Akepanidtaworn, Rick Di Mascio, Alex Imas, Lawrence Schmidt
29076.abstract: Are market experts prone to heuristics, and if so, do they transfer across closely related domains—buying and selling? We investigate this question using a unique dataset of institutional investors with portfolios averaging $\$573$ million. A striking finding emerges: while there is clear evidence of skill in buying, selling decisions underperform substantially—even relative to random selling strategies. This holds despite the similarity between the two decisions in frequency, substance and consequences for performance. Evidence suggests that an asymmetric allocation of cognitive resources such as attention can explain the discrepancy: we document a systematic, costly heuristic process when selling but not when buying.
29076.zh_abstract: 市场专家是否容易受到启发式偏差的影响？如果存在这种偏差，它们是否会在密切相关的领域——买入和卖出——之间转移？我们利用一个独特的机构投资者数据集来研究这个问题，这些投资者的投资组合平均规模为5.73亿美元。一个引人注目的发现出现了：尽管在买入决策中存在明显的技能证据，但卖出决策的表现却显著不佳——甚至相对于随机卖出策略也是如此。尽管这两个决策在频率、实质以及对绩效的影响方面具有相似性，这一发现仍然成立。证据表明，认知资源（如注意力）的不对称分配可以解释这种差异：我们记录了在卖出时存在一个系统性且代价高昂的启发式过程，但在买入时则没有。

29075.title: Vaccine Hesitancy, Passports and the Demand for Vaccination
29075.zh_title: 疫苗犹豫、疫苗护照与疫苗接种需求
29075.abstract: Vaccine hesitancy is modelled as an endogenous decision within a behavioural SIR model with endogenous agent activity. It is shown that policy interventions that directly target costs associated with vaccine adoption may counter vaccine hesitancy while those that manipulate the utility of unvaccinated agents will either lead to the same or lower rates of vaccine adoption. This latter effect arises with vaccine passports whose effects are mitigated in equilibrium by reductions in viral/disease prevalence that themselves reduce the demand for vaccination.
29075.zh_abstract: 疫苗犹豫被建模为行为SIR模型中的一个内生决策，其中包含内生化的个体活动。研究表明，直接针对与疫苗采用相关成本的政策干预可能会对抗疫苗犹豫，而那些操纵未接种疫苗个体效用的政策则会导致相同或更低的疫苗接种率。后一种效应出现在疫苗护照中，其影响在均衡中被病毒/疾病流行率的降低所削弱，而流行率的降低本身又减少了疫苗接种需求。

29074.title: Experience Effects in Finance: Foundations, Applications, and Future Directions
29074.zh_title: 金融中的经验效应：基础、应用与未来方向
29074.abstract: This article establishes four key findings of the growing literature on experience effects in finance: (1) the long-lasting imprint of past experiences on beliefs and risk taking, (2) recency effects, (3) the domain-specificity of experience effects, and (4) imperviousness to information that is not experience-based. I first discuss the neuroscientific foundations of experience-based learning and sketch a simple model of its role in the stock market based on Malmendier et al. (2020a,b). I then distill the empirical findings on experience effects in stock-market investment, trade dynamics, and international capital flows, highlighting these four key features. Finally, I contrast models of belief formation that rely on “learned information” with models accounting for the neuroscience evidence on synaptic tagging and memory formation, and provide directions for future research.
29074.zh_abstract: 本文确立了关于金融中经验效应的日益增长的文献的四个关键发现：（1）过去经历对信念和风险承担的长期烙印，（2）近因效应，（3）经验效应的领域特异性，以及（4）对非基于经验的信息的免疫性。我首先讨论了基于经验学习的神经科学基础，并基于Malmendier等人（2020a,b）的研究勾勒了一个关于其在股票市场中作用的简单模型。然后，我提炼了关于股票市场投资、贸易动态和国际资本流动中经验效应的实证发现，突出了这四个关键特征。最后，我将依赖“习得信息”的信念形成模型与考虑神经科学关于突触标记和记忆形成证据的模型进行对比，并为未来研究提供了方向。
29074.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D03, D8, D83, D87, D9, E17, E52, E7, G02, G4

29073.title: Do Market Failures Create a ‘Durability Gap’ in the Circular Economy?
29073.zh_title: 市场失灵是否在循环经济中造成了“耐用性缺口”？
29073.abstract: The interdisciplinary circular economy literature recommends longer lasting products, to reduce pollution from repeated production and disposal. For any type of appliance, we assume consumers choose among variants with different durability. Firms are competitive. Standard Pigovian analysis shows that optimal taxes depend on pollution and not on product life. Here, we find conditions where consumers choose lives that are too short – a “durability gap”. First, we show that suboptimal existing output taxes imply suboptimal durability. An increase in uniform tax on all variants encourages purchase of a more durable variant and raises welfare. Second, welfare also is raised by a subsidy for choosing a more durable variant or by a marginally binding durability mandate. Third, we find that a social discount rate less than the private rate is the strongest case for policy to favor durability. Fourth, the consumer misperceptions we study have ambiguous implications for durability policy.
29073.zh_abstract: 跨学科的循环经济文献推荐使用更耐用的产品，以减少因重复生产和处置造成的污染。对于任何类型的电器，我们假设消费者在不同耐用性的变体之间进行选择。企业是竞争性的。标准的庇古分析表明，最优税收取决于污染而非产品寿命。在这里，我们找到了消费者选择寿命过短的条件——即“耐用性缺口”。首先，我们表明次优的现有产出税意味着次优的耐用性。对所有变体征收统一税率的增加会鼓励购买更耐用的变体并提高福利。其次，通过补贴选择更耐用的变体或通过具有边际约束力的耐用性指令也能提高福利。第三，我们发现社会贴现率低于私人贴现率是政策支持耐用性的最强理由。第四，我们研究的消费者误解对耐用性政策具有模糊的含义。

29072.title: Are Student-Athletes Exploited?
29072.zh_title: 学生运动员是否被剥削？
29072.authors: James J. Heckman, Colleen P. Loughlin
29072.abstract: The Supreme Court decision NCAA vs Alston (June 2021) heightened interest in the benefits and costs of participating in sports for student-athletes. Anecdotal evidence about the exploitation of student-athletes was cited in the opinion and the media. Using panel data, we follow two different cohorts of students from high school through college and beyond. We examine the accuracy of the anecdotes as descriptions of the actual experiences of student-athletes. We show that, on average, student-athletes either out-perform or perform the same as observationally identical non-athletes in terms of graduation and post-collegiate salaries. Participation in athletics promotes social mobility.
29072.zh_abstract: 最高法院对NCAA诉Alston案（2021年6月）的裁决提高了人们对学生运动员参与体育运动的收益和成本的兴趣。关于学生运动员被剥削的轶事证据在判决意见和媒体中被引用。利用面板数据，我们跟踪了两组不同的学生群体，从高中到大学及以后。我们检验了这些轶事作为学生运动员实际经历描述的准确性。我们表明，平均而言，学生运动员在毕业率和大学毕业后薪资方面，要么优于观察上相同的非运动员，要么与之表现相同。参与体育运动促进了社会流动性。

29071.title: Uber and Alcohol-Related Traffic Fatalities
29071.zh_title: 优步与酒精相关的交通死亡事故
29071.authors: Michael L. Anderson, Lucas W. Davis
29071.abstract: Previous studies of the effect of ridesharing on traffic fatalities have yielded inconsistent, often contradictory conclusions. In this paper we revisit this question using proprietary data from Uber measuring monthly rideshare activity at the Census tract level. Most previous studies are based on publicly-available information about Uber entry dates into US cities, but we show that an indicator variable for whether Uber is available is a poor measure of rideshare activity — for example, it explains less than 3% of the tract-level variation in ridesharing, reflecting the enormous amount of variation both within and across cities. Using entry we find inconsistent and statistically insignificant estimates. However, when we use the more detailed proprietary data, we find a robust negative impact of ridesharing on traffic fatalities. Impacts concentrate during nights and weekends and are robust across a range of alternative specifications. Overall, our results imply that ridesharing has decreased US alcohol-related traffic fatalities by 6.1% and reduced total US traffic fatalities by 4.0%. Based on conventional estimates of the value of statistical life the annual life-saving benefits range from $\$2.3$ to $\$5.4$ billion. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest that these benefits may be of similar magnitude to producer surplus captured by Uber shareholders or consumer surplus captured by Uber riders.
29071.zh_abstract: 先前关于网约车对交通死亡事故影响的研究得出了不一致且常常相互矛盾的结论。在本文中，我们使用优步的专有数据重新审视这个问题，该数据以人口普查区为单位衡量月度网约车活动。大多数先前的研究基于关于优步进入美国城市日期的公开可用信息，但我们表明，优步是否可用的指标变量是网约车活动的一个糟糕度量——例如，它解释了不到3%的人口普查区层面的网约车变化，反映了城市内部和城市之间的巨大变化。使用进入指标，我们发现了不一致且统计上不显著的估计。然而，当我们使用更详细的专有数据时，我们发现网约车对交通死亡事故有稳健的负面影响。影响集中在夜间和周末，并且在一系列替代设定下都是稳健的。总体而言，我们的结果表明，网约车使美国与酒精相关的交通死亡事故减少了6.1%，并使美国总交通死亡事故减少了4.0%。基于统计生命价值的传统估计，每年的生命拯救效益在23亿至54亿美元之间。粗略计算表明，这些效益可能与优步股东获得的生产者剩余或优步乘客获得的消费者剩余规模相当。
29071.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I12, I18, R41, R49

29070.title: Machine Learning and Mobile Phone Data Can Improve the Targeting of Humanitarian Assistance
29070.zh_title: 机器学习和手机数据可以改善人道主义援助的瞄准
29070.authors: Emily Aiken, Suzanne Bellue, Dean Karlan, Christopher R. Udry, Joshua Blumenstock
29070.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has devastated many low- and middle-income countries, causing widespread food insecurity and a sharp decline in living standards. In response to this crisis, governments and humanitarian organizations worldwide have distributed social assistance to over 1.5 billion people. Targeting is a central challenge in administering these programs: given available data, how does one rapidly identify those with the greatest need? Here we show that data from mobile phone networks can improve the targeting of humanitarian assistance. Our approach uses traditional survey data to train machine-learning algorithms to recognize patterns of poverty in mobile phone data; the trained algorithms can then prioritize aid to the poorest mobile subscribers. We evaluate this approach by studying Togo’s flagship emergency cash transfer program, which used these algorithms to disburse millions of dollars in COVID-19 relief aid. Our analysis compares outcomes – including exclusion errors, total social welfare, and measures of fairness – under different targeting regimes. Relative to the geographic targeting options considered by the Government of Togo, the machine learning approach reduces errors of exclusion by 4-21%. Relative to methods requiring a comprehensive social registry (a hypothetical exercise; no such registry exists in Togo), the machine learning approach increases exclusion errors by 9-35%. These results highlight the potential for new data sources to complement traditional methods for targeting humanitarian assistance, particularly in crisis settings when traditional data are missing or out of date.
29070.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行摧毁了许多低收入和中等收入国家，导致广泛的粮食不安全和生活水平急剧下降。为应对这场危机，世界各地的政府和 humanitarian 组织已向超过15亿人分发了社会援助。瞄准是管理这些项目的核心挑战：在现有数据的情况下，如何快速识别那些最需要帮助的人？在这里，我们表明来自移动电话网络的数据可以改善人道主义援助的瞄准。我们的方法使用传统调查数据来训练机器学习算法，以识别手机数据中的贫困模式；训练后的算法可以优先向最贫困的手机用户提供援助。我们通过研究多哥的旗舰紧急现金转移项目来评估这种方法，该项目使用这些算法发放了数百万美元的COVID-19救济援助。我们的分析比较了不同瞄准制度下的结果——包括排除错误、总社会福利和公平性度量。相对于多哥政府考虑的地理瞄准选项，机器学习方法将排除错误减少了4-21%。相对于需要全面社会登记册的方法（一个假设性练习；多哥不存在这样的登记册），机器学习方法将排除错误增加了9-35%。这些结果凸显了新数据源在补充传统方法以瞄准人道主义援助方面的潜力，特别是在传统数据缺失或过时的危机环境中。
29070.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：C55, I32, I38, O12, O38

29069.title: Wealth and Insurance Choices: Evidence from US Households
29069.zh_title: 财富与保险选择：来自美国家庭的证据
29069.authors: Michael J. Gropper, Camelia M. Kuhnen
29069.abstract: Theoretically, wealthier people should buy less insurance, and should self-insure through saving instead, as insurance entails monitoring costs. Here, we use administrative data for 63,000 individuals and, contrary to theory, find that the wealthier have better life and property insurance coverage. Wealth-related differences in background risk, legal risk, liquidity constraints, financial literacy, and pricing explain only a small fraction of the positive wealth-insurance correlation. This puzzling correlation persists in individual fixed-effects models estimated using 2,500,000 person-month observations. The fact that the less wealthy have less coverage, though intuitively they benefit more from insurance, might increase financial health disparities among households.
29069.zh_abstract: 理论上，较富裕的人应该购买更少的保险，并通过储蓄进行自我保险，因为保险涉及监控成本。在这里，我们使用63,000名个人的行政数据，与理论相反，发现较富裕的人拥有更好的人寿和财产保险覆盖。背景风险、法律风险、流动性约束、金融素养和定价方面的财富相关差异只能解释正财富-保险相关性的一小部分。这种令人费解的相关性在使用2,500,000人-月观测值估计的个体固定效应模型中仍然存在。尽管直觉上较不富裕的人从保险中受益更多，但他们拥有更少的保险覆盖这一事实可能会加剧家庭之间的金融健康差距。

29068.title: Teacher Compensation and Structural Inequality: Evidence from Centralized Teacher School Choice in Perú
29068.zh_title: 教师薪酬与结构性不平等：来自秘鲁集中式教师择校的证据
29068.authors: Matteo Bobba, Tim Ederer, Gianmarco Leon-Ciliotta, Christopher Neilson, Marco G. Nieddu
29068.abstract: We exploit data on centralized teacher recruitment in Perú to establish that wage rigidity creates large urban-rural disparities in teacher effectiveness. Leveraging a teacher compensation reform, we provide causal evidence that increasing salaries in less desirable locations attracts qualified teachers and improves student learning. We estimate a model of teacher sorting and student achievement featuring rich heterogeneity in teachers’ preferences and effectiveness. Substantial equity and efficiency gains arise from reallocating existing teachers to exploit match effects or attracting applicants with higher average effectiveness into public teaching. Cost-minimizing counterfactual wage schedules aimed at achieving these gains imply the latter is more cost-effective.
29068.zh_abstract: 我们利用秘鲁集中式教师招聘的数据，证实工资刚性造成了城乡之间教师效能的大幅差异。借助一项教师薪酬改革，我们提供了因果证据，表明在不太理想的地区提高工资能够吸引合格教师并改善学生学习。我们估计了一个教师分类与学生成绩的模型，该模型充分体现了教师偏好和效能的异质性。通过重新分配现有教师以利用匹配效应，或吸引平均效能更高的申请者进入公立教学领域，可以带来显著的公平与效率提升。旨在实现这些收益的成本最小化反事实工资方案表明，后者更具成本效益。
29068.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS；JEL：H52, I20, J3, J45, O15, R23, R58

29067.title: Designing Fuel-Economy Standards in Light of Electric Vehicles
29067.zh_title: 考虑电动汽车的燃油经济性标准设计
29067.abstract: Electric vehicles are declining in cost so rapidly that they may claim a large share of the vehicle market by 2030. This paper examines a set of practical regulatory design considerations for fuel-economy standards or greenhouse gas standards in the context of highly uncertain electric vehicle costs in the next decade. The analysis takes a cost-effectiveness approach and uses analytical modeling and simulation to develop insight. I show that counting electric vehicles under a standard with a multiplier or assuming zero upstream emissions can reduce electric vehicle market share by weakening the standards. Further, there are tradeoffs from implementing a backstop conventional vehicle standard along with a second standard that also includes electric vehicles, but such a backstop offers the possibility of ensuring that low-cost conventional vehicle technologies are exploited.
29067.zh_abstract: 电动汽车成本下降如此迅速，以至于到2030年它们可能占据汽车市场的很大份额。本文考察了在下一个十年电动汽车成本高度不确定的背景下，燃油经济性标准或温室气体标准的一系列实际监管设计考量。分析采用成本效益方法，并利用分析模型和模拟来形成见解。我表明，在标准下以乘数计算电动汽车或假设其上游零排放，可能会因削弱标准而降低电动汽车市场份额。此外，实施一项后备常规车辆标准以及另一项也包括电动汽车的标准之间存在权衡，但这种后备方案提供了确保低成本常规车辆技术得到利用的可能性。
29067.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H23, Q48, Q53, Q54, Q58, R48

29066.title: Regulating Conglomerates in China: Evidence from an Energy Conservation Program
29066.zh_title: 监管中国企业集团：来自一项节能计划的证据
29066.authors: Qiaoyi Chen, Zhao Chen, Zhikuo Liu, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato, Daniel Xu
29066.abstract: We study a prominent energy regulation affecting large Chinese manufacturers that are part of broader conglomerates. Using detailed firm-level data and difference-in-differences research designs, we show that regulated firms cut output and shifted production to unregulated firms in the same conglomerate instead of improving their energy efficiency. Conglomerate spillovers account for 40% of the output loss of regulated firms and substantially reduce aggregate energy savings. Using a structural model, we show that alternative polices that use public information on business networks could lower the shadow cost of the regulation by more than 40% and increase aggregate energy savings by 10%.
29066.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项影响大型中国制造商（这些制造商属于更广泛的企业集团）的重要能源监管。利用详细的企业层面数据和双重差分研究设计，我们表明受监管企业削减了产出，并将生产转移至同一集团内未受监管的企业，而非提高其能源效率。企业集团溢出效应占受监管企业产出损失的40%，并大幅减少了总体能源节约。通过一个结构模型，我们表明利用商业网络公共信息的替代政策可以将监管的影子成本降低超过40%，并将总体能源节约提高10%。
29066.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, IO, PR；JEL：H23, L51, O44, Q48

29065.title: Who Owns What? A Factor Model for Direct Stock Holding
29065.zh_title: 谁拥有什么？直接持股的因子模型
29065.authors: Vimal Balasubramaniam, John Y. Campbell, Tarun Ramadorai, Benjamin Ranish
29065.abstract: We build a cross-sectional factor model for investors' direct stock holdings, by analogy with standard time-series factor models for stock returns. We estimate the model using data from almost 10 million retail accounts in the Indian stock market. We find that stock characteristics such as firm age and share price have strong investor clienteles associated with them. Similarly, account attributes such as account age, account size, and extreme underdiversification (holding a single stock) are associated with particular characteristic preferences. Coheld stocks tend to have higher return covariance, suggestive of the importance of clientele effects in the stock market.
29065.zh_abstract: 我们为投资者直接持股构建了一个横截面因子模型，类似于股票收益的标准时间序列因子模型。我们利用印度股市近1000万散户账户的数据估计该模型。我们发现，公司年龄和股价等股票特征与特定的投资者客户群相关联。同样，账户年龄、账户规模和极端分散化不足（持有单只股票）等账户属性与特定的特征偏好相关联。共同持有的股票往往具有更高的收益协方差，这表明客户群效应在股票市场中的重要性。

29064.title: Climate Change Uncertainty Spillover in the Macroeconomy
29064.zh_title: 宏观经济中的气候变化不确定性溢出
29064.authors: Michael Barnett, William Brock, Lars P. Hansen
29064.abstract: The design and conduct of climate change policy necessarily confronts uncertainty along multiple fronts. We explore the consequences of ambiguity over various sources and configurations of models that impact how economic opportunities could be damaged in the future. We appeal to decision theory under risk, model ambiguity and misspecification concerns to provide an economically motivated approach to uncertainty quantification. We show how this approach reduces the many facets of uncertainty into a low dimensional characterization that depends on the uncertainty aversion of a decision-maker or fictitious social planner. In our computations, we take inventory of three alternative channels of uncertainty and provide a novel way to assess them. These include i) carbon dynamics that capture how carbon emissions impact atmospheric carbon in future time periods; ii) temperature dynamics that depict how atmospheric carbon alters temperature in future time periods; iii) damage functions that quantify how temperature changes diminish economic opportunities. We appeal to geoscientific modeling to quantify the first two channels. We show how these uncertainty sources interact for a social planner looking to design a prudent approach to the social pricing of carbon emissions.
29064.zh_abstract: 气候变化政策的设计和实施必然面临多方面的不确定性。我们探讨了影响经济机会未来受损方式的模型的各种来源和配置所带来的模糊性后果。我们运用风险下的决策理论、模型模糊性和误设担忧，提供了一种基于经济学动机的不确定性量化方法。我们展示了这种方法如何将不确定性的多个方面简化为一个低维特征，该特征取决于决策者或虚构社会规划者的不确定性厌恶程度。在我们的计算中，我们盘点了三种替代的不确定性渠道，并提供了一种新颖的评估方式。这些渠道包括：i) 碳动态，它捕捉碳排放如何影响未来时期的大气碳含量；ii) 温度动态，它描述大气碳如何改变未来时期的温度；iii) 损害函数，它量化温度变化如何减少经济机会。我们借助地球科学建模来量化前两个渠道。我们展示了这些不确定性来源如何相互作用，对于一个寻求设计审慎的碳排放社会定价方法的社会规划者而言。
29064.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, EFG；JEL：D81, E61, G12, G18, Q51, Q54

29063.title: Inequality in Life and Death
29063.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
29063.abstract: We argue that the Covid epidemic disproportionately affected the economic well-being and health of poor people. To disentangle the forces that generated this outcome, we construct a model that is consistent with the heterogeneous impact of the Covid recession on low- and high-income people. According to our model, two thirds of the inequality in Covid deaths reflect pre-existing inequality in comorbidity rates and access to quality health care. The remaining third, stems from the fact that low-income people work in occupations where the risk of infection is high. Our model also implies that the rise in income inequality generated by the Covid epidemic reflects the nature of the goods that low-income people produce. Finally, we assess the health-income trade-offs associated with fiscal transfers to the poor and mandatory containment policies.
29063.zh_abstract: 我们认为新冠疫情对穷人的经济福祉和健康造成了不成比例的影响。为了厘清产生这一结果的力量，我们构建了一个与新冠疫情衰退对低收入和高收入人群异质性影响相一致的模型。根据我们的模型，新冠死亡不平等中的三分之二反映了先前存在的共病率和优质医疗保健可及性的不平等。剩余的三分之一源于低收入人群从事感染风险高的职业。我们的模型还表明，新冠疫情产生的收入不平等上升反映了低收入人群所生产商品的性质。最后，我们评估了与向穷人提供财政转移和强制性封锁政策相关的健康-收入权衡。

29062.title: Gay Politics Goes Mainstream: Democrats, Republicans, and Same-Sex Relationships
29062.zh_title: 同性恋政治走向主流：民主党、共和党与同性关系
29062.abstract: Attitudes towards same-sex relationships in the US have changed radically over a relatively short period of time. After remaining fairly constant for over two decades, opinions became more favorable starting in 1992—a presidential election year in which the Democratic and Republican parties took opposing stands over the status of gay people in society. What roles did political parties and their leaders play in this process of cultural change? Using a variety of techniques including machine learning, we show that the partisan opinion gap emerged substantially prior to 1992—in the mid 1980s —and did not increase as a result of the political debates in 1992-'93. Furthermore, we identify people with a college-and-above education as the potential "leaders" of the process of partisan divergence.
29062.zh_abstract: 美国对同性关系的态度在相对较短的时间内发生了根本性变化。在保持相当稳定二十多年后，观点从1992年开始变得更加有利——那是一个总统选举年，民主党和共和党就同性恋者在社会中的地位采取了相反的立场。政党和他们的领导人在这一文化变革过程中扮演了什么角色？使用包括机器学习在内的多种技术，我们表明党派意见分歧实际上早在1992年之前——即20世纪80年代中期——就已出现，并且并未因1992-93年的政治辩论而扩大。此外，我们将受过大学及以上教育的人确定为党派分歧过程的潜在“领导者”。

29061.title: Mechanizing Agriculture
29061.abstract: What are the gains from mechanization? We run a randomized control trial that subsidizes access to equipment rental markets to study how the adoption of mechanization shifts farming households’ labor supply, farm productivity and labor demand. The intervention induces greater mechanization in the upstream production stage, with labor savings concentrated in downstream, non-mechanized stages. Savings on family labor are concentrated among members engaged in worker supervision and accompanied by an increase in households’ non-agricultural income. To assess the welfare implications of the intervention, we build a model of heterogeneous farmers that make joint labor supply and production decisions because incentives to mechanize depend on the opportunity cost of supervising hired labor. The calibrated model predicts a consumption-equivalent welfare improvement of 7.6%, with two-thirds of those gains accruing to leisure. Welfare gains are heterogeneous despite common treatment effects. Through counterfactuals, we show that endogenous productivity gains account for relatively more of the welfare gains for farmers with low-supervision ability.
29061.zh_abstract: 机械化的收益是什么？我们进行了一项随机对照试验，补贴农户获取设备租赁市场，以研究采用机械化如何改变农户家庭的劳动力供给、农业生产率和劳动力需求。干预措施在上游生产阶段诱导了更大的机械化，而劳动力节省集中在非机械化的下游阶段。家庭劳动力的节省集中在从事工人监督的成员身上，并伴随着家庭非农业收入的增加。为了评估干预措施的福利影响，我们构建了一个异质性农户模型，这些农户共同做出劳动力供给和生产决策，因为机械化的激励取决于监督雇佣劳动力的机会成本。校准后的模型预测消费等价福利改善为7.6%，其中三分之二的收益归于闲暇。尽管处理效应相同，但福利收益是异质性的。通过反事实分析，我们表明对于监督能力低的农户，内生生产率增长在福利收益中占相对更大的份额。

29060.title: Modeling Macroeconomic Variations after Covid-19
29060.zh_title: 新冠疫情后宏观经济变动的建模
29060.abstract: The coronavirus is a global event of historical proportions and just a few months changed the time series properties of the data in ways that make many pre-covid forecasting models inadequate. It also creates a new problem for estimation of economic factors and dynamic causal effects because the variations around the outbreak can be interpreted as outliers, as shifts to the distribution of existing shocks, or as addition of new shocks. I take the latter view and use covid indicators as controls to 'de-covid' the data prior to estimation. I find that economic uncertainty remains high at the end of 2020 even though real economic activity has recovered and covid uncertainty has receded. Dynamic responses of variables to shocks in a VAR similar in magnitude and shape to the ones identified before 2020 can be recovered by directly or indirectly modeling covid and treating it as exogenous. These responses to economic shocks are distinctly different from those to a covid shock, and distinguishing between the two types of shocks can be important in macroeconomic modeling post-covid.
29060.zh_abstract: 新冠病毒是一个具有历史意义的全球性事件，仅几个月就改变了数据的时间序列特性，使得许多疫情前的预测模型不再适用。这也为经济因素和动态因果效应的估计带来了新问题，因为疫情爆发前后的变动可以被解释为异常值、现有冲击分布的偏移或新冲击的加入。本文采取后一种观点，在估计前使用新冠指标作为控制变量对数据进行“去新冠化”处理。研究发现，尽管实际经济活动已复苏且新冠不确定性已消退，但2020年底经济不确定性仍然高企。通过直接或间接地对新冠进行建模并将其视为外生变量，可以恢复变量对冲击的动态响应，其幅度和形状与2020年前识别到的冲击相似。这些对经济冲击的响应与对新冠冲击的响应截然不同，区分这两类冲击在疫情后的宏观经济建模中可能至关重要。

29059.title: Strategic or Confused Firms? Evidence from "Missing" Transactions in Uganda
29059.zh_title: 战略型企业还是困惑型企业？来自乌干达“缺失”交易的证据
29059.authors: Miguel Almunia, Jonas Hjort, Justine Knebelmann, Lin Tian
29059.abstract: Are firms sophisticated maximizers, or do they consistently make errors? Using transaction-level data from Ugandan value-added tax (VAT) returns, we show that sellers and buyers report different amounts 79% of the time, despite invoices being easily cross-checked. We estimate that 25% of firms are disadvantageous misreporters—they systematically misreport own sales and purchases such that their tax liability increases—while 75% are advantageous misreporters. Many firms—especially disadvantageous misreporters—fail to report imported inputs they themselves reported at Customs, increasing their VAT liability. On net, unilateral VAT misreporting cost Uganda about US$\$384$ million in foregone 2013-2016 tax revenue
29059.zh_abstract: 企业是精明的最大化者，还是一贯犯错？利用乌干达增值税申报表中的交易层面数据，我们发现尽管发票易于交叉核对，但79%的情况下买卖双方报告的金额不一致。我们估计25%的企业是不利误报者——它们系统性地误报自身销售额和采购额，导致税负增加——而75%的企业是有利误报者。许多企业，尤其是不利误报者，未能报告其自身在海关申报的进口投入品，从而增加了增值税负债。总体而言，单边增值税误报在2013-2016年间使乌干达损失了约3.84亿美元的税收收入。

29057.title: The Lasting Effects of Early Childhood Education on Promoting the Skills and Social Mobility of Disadvantaged African Americans
29057.zh_title: 早期儿童教育对提升弱势非裔美国人技能和社会流动性的持久影响
29057.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman, Victor Ronda
29057.abstract: This paper demonstrates multiple beneficial impacts of a program promoting intergenerational mobility for disadvantaged African-American children and their children. The program improves outcomes of the first-generation treatment group across the life cycle, which translates into better family environments for the second generation leading to positive intergenerational gains. There are long-lasting beneficial program effects on cognition through age 54, contradicting claims of fadeout that have dominated popular discussions of early childhood programs. Children of the first-generation treatment group have higher levels of education and employment, lower levels of criminal activity, and better health than children of the first-generation control group.
29057.zh_abstract: 本文展示了一项旨在促进弱势非裔美国儿童及其子女代际流动的项目的多重有益影响。该项目改善了第一代实验组在整个生命周期中的结果，这转化为第二代更好的家庭环境，从而带来积极的代际收益。该项目对认知能力的影响持续到54岁，这与主导早期儿童项目公众讨论的“消退”说法相矛盾。与第一代对照组子女相比，第一代实验组子女在教育和就业方面水平更高，犯罪活动水平更低，健康状况也更好。
29057.meta: Programs：CH, ED, PE；JEL：C93, H43, I28, J13

29056.title: Long Term Effects of Cash Transfer Programs in Colombia
29056.zh_title: 哥伦比亚现金转移项目的长期效应
29056.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Lina Cardona Sosa, Carlos Medina, Costas Meghir, Christian Manuel Posso-Suárez
29056.abstract: Conditional Cash transfer (CCT) programs have been shown to have positive effects on a variety of outcomes including education, consumption and health visits, amongst others. We estimate the long-run impacts of the urban version of Familias en Acción, the Colombian CCT program on crime, teenage pregnancy, high school dropout and college enrollment using a Regression Discontinuity design on administrative data. ITT estimates show a reduction on arrest rates of 2.7pp for men and a reduction on teenage pregnancy of 2.3pp for women. High school dropout rates were reduced by 5.8pp and college enrollment was increased by 1.7pp for men.
29056.zh_abstract: 有条件的现金转移项目已被证明对教育、消费和健康就诊等多种结果具有积极影响。我们利用行政数据，通过断点回归设计，估计了哥伦比亚有条件现金转移项目“家庭行动”城市版本对犯罪、青少年怀孕、高中辍学和大学入学的长期影响。意向性治疗估计显示，男性逮捕率降低了2.7个百分点，女性青少年怀孕率降低了2.3个百分点。男性高中辍学率降低了5.8个百分点，大学入学率提高了1.7个百分点。
29056.meta: Programs：DEV, LE；JEL：D04, I23, I28, I31, J13, K42

29055.title: A Note on the Level of Customer Support by State Governments: A Mystery-Shopping Approach
29055.zh_title: 关于州政府客户支持水平的说明：一种神秘购物方法
29055.authors: Oeindrila Dube, Sendhil Mullainathan, Devin G. Pope
29055.abstract: Many government services are provided at the state level such as unemployment insurance, Medicaid, and SNAP. Given the lack of competition, a natural worry is that customer support provided by states for these services is less than adequate. While there are many different measures of how a state can support beneficiaries, we focus on just one in this short and applied report: the ability to get a live representative on the phone to help with an application question. To do this, we take a “mystery shopping” approach and make 2,000 phone calls to state government offices. We find substantial heterogeneity in the availability of live phone representatives across states and types of service (UI, Medicaid, etc.). For example, live representatives in New Jersey and Georgia were reached less than 20% of the time while representatives in New Hampshire and Wisconsin were reached more than 80% of the time. We hope that this report provides a simple example for how academics, investigative reporters, and watch groups can help states be more accountable for their customer support systems.
29055.zh_abstract: 许多政府服务，如失业保险、医疗补助和补充营养援助计划，由州一级提供。由于缺乏竞争，一个自然的担忧是各州为这些服务提供的客户支持可能不足。虽然衡量州如何支持受益人的方法有很多，但在这份简短的应用报告中，我们只关注一点：通过电话联系到真人代表以帮助解答申请问题的能力。为此，我们采用“神秘购物”方法，向州政府办公室拨打了2000通电话。我们发现，各州以及不同服务类型（如失业保险、医疗补助等）之间，在真人电话代表的可用性方面存在显著异质性。例如，新泽西州和佐治亚州的真人代表接通率低于20%，而新罕布什尔州和威斯康星州的接通率则超过80%。我们希望这份报告能提供一个简单的范例，说明学者、调查记者和监察团体如何帮助各州对其客户支持系统更加负责。

29054.title: Effects of Welfare Reform on Household Food Insecurity Across Generations
29054.zh_title: 福利改革对跨代家庭粮食不安全的影响
29054.authors: Hope Corman, Dhaval M. Dave, Nancy Reichman, Ofira Schwartz-Soicher
29054.abstract: This study estimated the effects of welfare reform in the 1990s, which permanently restructured and contracted the cash assistance system in the U.S., on food insecurity—a fundamental form of hardship—of the next generation of households. An implicit goal underlying welfare reform was the disruption of an assumed intergenerational transmission of disadvantage; however, little is known about the effects of welfare reform on the well-being of the next generation. Using intergenerational data from the Panel Study of Income Dynamics and a variation on a difference-in-differences framework, this study exploits 3 sources of variation in childhood exposure to welfare reform: (1) risk of exposure across birth cohorts; (2) variation of exposure within cohorts because different states implemented welfare reform in different years; and (3) variation between individuals with the same exposure who were more likely and less likely to rely on welfare. We found that exposure to welfare reform led to decreases in food insecurity of the next generation of households, by about 10% for a 5-year increase in exposure, with stronger effects for women, individuals exposed for longer durations during childhood, individuals exposed in early childhood (0-5 years), and individuals whose mothers had a high school education (versus less).
29054.zh_abstract: 本研究估计了1990年代福利改革（该改革永久性地重组并缩减了美国现金援助体系）对下一代家庭粮食不安全（一种基本形式的困难）的影响。福利改革的一个隐含目标是打破假设的劣势代际传递；然而，关于福利改革对下一代福祉的影响，我们知之甚少。本研究利用收入动态面板研究的代际数据以及双重差分框架的变体，利用了童年时期福利改革暴露程度的三个变异来源：（1）不同出生队列的暴露风险；（2）由于不同州在不同年份实施福利改革，同一队列内部的暴露变异；（3）在相同暴露程度下，更可能和更不可能依赖福利的个体之间的变异。我们发现，福利改革的暴露导致下一代家庭粮食不安全状况下降，暴露时间每增加5年，粮食不安全约减少10%，对女性、童年时期暴露时间更长者、幼儿期（0-5岁）暴露者以及母亲受过高中教育（相对于更低教育水平）的个体影响更强。
29054.meta: Programs：CH, EH, PE；JEL：H53, I14, I3, I38

29053.title: Systemic Discrimination Among Large U.S. Employers
29053.zh_title: 美国大型雇主中的系统性歧视
29053.authors: Patrick M. Kline, Evan K. Rose, Christopher R. Walters
29053.abstract: We study the results of a massive nationwide correspondence experiment sending more than 83,000 fictitious applications with randomized characteristics to geographically dispersed jobs posted by 108 of the largest U.S. employers. Distinctively Black names reduce the probability of employer contact by 2.1 percentage points relative to distinctively white names. The magnitude of this racial gap in contact rates differs substantially across firms, exhibiting a between-company standard deviation of 1.9 percentage points. Despite an insignificant average gap in contact rates between male and female applicants, we find a between-company standard deviation in gender contact gaps of 2.7 percentage points, revealing that some firms favor male applicants while others favor women. Company-specific racial contact gaps are temporally and spatially persistent, and negatively correlated with firm profitability, federal contractor status, and a measure of recruiting centralization. Discrimination exhibits little geographical dispersion, but two digit industry explains roughly half of the cross-firm variation in both racial and gender contact gaps. Contact gaps are highly concentrated in particular companies, with firms in the top quintile of racial discrimination responsible for nearly half of lost contacts to Black applicants in the experiment. Controlling false discovery rates to the 5% level, 23 individual companies are found to discriminate against Black applicants. Our findings establish that discrimination against distinctively Black names is concentrated among a select set of large employers, many of which can be identified with high confidence using large scale inference methods.
29053.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项大规模全国性通信实验的结果，该实验向108家美国最大雇主发布的、地理位置分散的职位发送了超过83,000份带有随机特征的虚构申请。与非裔美国人名字相比，显著的黑人名字使雇主联系的概率降低了2.1个百分点。这种种族联系率差距的幅度在不同公司间差异很大，公司间标准差为1.9个百分点。尽管男性和女性申请者的平均联系率差距不显著，但我们发现性别联系率差距的公司间标准差为2.7个百分点，这表明一些公司偏爱男性申请者，而另一些则偏爱女性。公司特定的种族联系率差距在时间和空间上具有持续性，并与公司盈利能力、联邦承包商身份以及招聘集中度指标呈负相关。歧视在地理分布上差异不大，但两位数的行业分类解释了约一半的种族和性别联系率差距的公司间变异。联系率差距高度集中在特定公司，种族歧视程度最高的五分之一公司占实验中黑人申请者失去联系机会的近一半。将错误发现率控制在5%的水平，有23家个体公司被发现歧视黑人申请者。我们的研究结果表明，对显著黑人名字的歧视集中在少数大型雇主中，其中许多可以通过大规模推断方法以高置信度识别出来。
29053.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C11, C9, C93, J7, J71, J78, K31, K42

29099.title: Structural Change in Labor Supply and Cross-Country Differences in Hours Worked
29099.zh_title: 劳动力供给的结构性变化与各国工作时间的差异
29099.authors: Alexander Bick, Nicola Fuchs-Schündeln, David Lagakos, Hitoshi Tsujiyama
29099.abstract: This paper studies how structural change in labor supply along the development spectrum shapes cross-country differences in hours worked. We emphasize two main forces: sectoral reallocation from self-employment to wage work, and declining fixed costs of wage work. We show that these forces are crucial for understanding how the extensive margin (the employment rate) and intensive margin (hours per worker) of aggregate hours worked vary with income per capita. To do so we build and estimate a quantitative model of labor supply featuring a traditional self-employment sector and a modern wage-employment sector. When estimated to match cross-country data, the model predicts that sectoral reallocation explains more than half of the total hours decrease at lower levels of development. Declining fixed costs drive the rise in employment rates at higher levels of income per capita, and imply higher hours in the future, in contrast to the lower hours resulting from income effects and expansions in tax-and-transfer systems.
29099.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在发展过程中劳动力供给的结构性变化如何塑造各国工作时间的差异。我们强调两个主要力量：从自雇就业到工资工作的部门再配置，以及工资工作固定成本的下降。我们表明，这些力量对于理解总工作时间的外延边际（就业率）和内涵边际（每个工人的工作时数）如何随人均收入变化至关重要。为此，我们构建并估计了一个包含传统自雇部门和现代工资就业部门的劳动力供给定量模型。当该模型被估计以匹配跨国数据时，它预测部门再配置解释了较低发展水平下总工作时间减少的一半以上。固定成本的下降推动了较高人均收入水平下就业率的上升，并意味着未来工作时间将更高，这与收入效应以及税收-转移支付体系扩张所导致的较低工作时间形成对比。

29098.title: The Great Canadian Recovery: The Impact of COVID-19 on Canada's Labour Market
29098.zh_title: 伟大的加拿大复苏：COVID-19对加拿大劳动力市场的影响
29098.authors: Stephen R.G. Jones, Fabian Lange, W. Craig Riddell, Casey Warman
29098.abstract: The Canadian labour market experienced a period of unprecedented turmoil following the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic. We analyze the main changes using standard labour force statistics and new data on job postings. Envisaging a phase of temporary severing of employment relationships followed by a phase of more standard labour market search and matching, we use stock and flow data to understand key developments. We fond dramatic changes in employment, unemployment and labour market attachment in the first few months of the pandemic and a broad though gradual recovery through to the end of 2021.
29098.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行爆发后，加拿大劳动力市场经历了一段前所未有的动荡时期。我们利用标准劳动力统计数据以及关于职位发布的新数据来分析主要变化。设想一个就业关系暂时中断的阶段，随后是一个更标准的劳动力市场搜索与匹配阶段，我们使用存量和流量数据来理解关键发展。我们发现，在大流行的最初几个月，就业、失业和劳动力市场依附关系发生了剧烈变化，随后到2021年底经历了广泛但渐进的复苏。
29098.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, EH, LS；JEL：E24, E32, I14, I18, I3, J21, J23, J31, J63

29097.title: Inertia, Market Power, and Adverse Selection in Health Insurance: Evidence from the ACA Exchanges
29097.zh_title: 健康保险中的惯性、市场势力与逆向选择：来自ACA交易所的证据
29097.authors: Evan Saltzman, Ashley Swanson, Daniel Polsky
29097.abstract: We study how inertia interacts with market power and adverse selection in managed competition health insurance markets. We use consumer-level data to estimate a model of the California ACA exchange, in which four firms dominate the market and risk adjustment is in place to manage selection. We estimate high inertia costs, equal to 44% of average premiums. Although eliminating inertia exacerbates adverse selection, it significantly reduces market power such that average premiums decrease 13.2% and annual per-capita welfare increases $\$902$. These effects are substantially smaller in settings without market power and/or risk adjustment. Moreover, converting the ACA's premium-linked subsidies to vouchers mitigates the impact of inertia by reducing market power, whereas reducing high consumer churn in the ACA exchanges increases the impact of inertia by enhancing market power. The impact of inertia is not sensitive to provider network generosity, despite greater consumer attachment to plans with more differentiated provider networks.
29097.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在管理竞争型健康保险市场中，惯性如何与市场势力和逆向选择相互作用。我们使用消费者层面数据来估计加利福尼亚州ACA交易所的模型，在该交易所中，四家公司主导市场，并实施了风险调整以管理选择。我们估计出高昂的惯性成本，相当于平均保费的44%。尽管消除惯性会加剧逆向选择，但它显著降低了市场势力，使得平均保费下降13.2%，年人均福利增加902美元。在没有市场势力和/或风险调整的环境中，这些效应要小得多。此外，将ACA与保费挂钩的补贴转换为代金券，通过降低市场势力来减轻惯性的影响，而减少ACA交易所中高消费者流失率则通过增强市场势力来增加惯性的影响。惯性的影响对提供者网络的慷慨程度并不敏感，尽管消费者对具有更差异化提供者网络的计划有更强的依附性。

29096.title: Buying Data from Consumers: The Impact of Monitoring in U.S. Auto Insurance
29096.zh_title: 从消费者处购买数据：美国汽车保险中监控的影响
29096.abstract: New technologies have enabled firms to elicit granular behavioral data from consumers in exchange for lower prices and better experiences. This data can mitigate asymmetric information and moral hazard, but it may also increase firms’ market power if kept proprietary. We study a voluntary monitoring program by a major U.S. auto insurer, in which drivers accept short-term tracking in exchange for potential discounts on future premiums. Using a proprietary dataset matched with competitor price menus, we document that safer drivers self-select into monitoring, and those who opt-in become 30% safer while monitored. Using an equilibrium model of consumer choice and firm pricing for insurance and monitoring, we find that the monitoring program generates large profit and welfare gains. However, large demand frictions hurt monitoring adoption, forcing the firm to offer large discounts to induce opt-in while tempering the profitability of heavy ex-post rent extraction. A counterfactual data portability policy would further reduce the firm’s incentive to elicit monitoring data, leading to less monitoring and lower consumer welfare in equilibrium.
29096.zh_abstract: 新技术使企业能够以更低价格和更好体验为交换，从消费者处获取细粒度行为数据。这些数据可以缓解信息不对称和道德风险，但如果保持专有，也可能增强企业的市场势力。我们研究了一家美国主要汽车保险公司实施的自愿监控计划，在该计划中，司机接受短期追踪以换取未来保费的潜在折扣。使用与竞争对手价格菜单匹配的专有数据集，我们记录了更安全的司机自我选择进入监控，而那些选择加入的司机在监控期间变得安全30%。通过使用一个关于保险和监控的消费者选择与企业定价的均衡模型，我们发现该监控计划产生了巨大的利润和福利收益。然而，巨大的需求摩擦损害了监控的采用，迫使企业提供大幅折扣以诱导选择加入，同时抑制了事后大量租金提取的盈利能力。一项反事实的数据可移植性政策将进一步降低企业获取监控数据的激励，导致均衡状态下监控减少和消费者福利降低。

29095.title: The Making of Social Democracy: The Economic and Electoral Consequences of Norway’s 1936 Folk School Reform
29095.zh_title: 社会民主主义的形成：挪威1936年民众学校改革的经济与选举后果
29095.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Tuomas Pekkarinen, Kjell G. Salvanes, Matti Sarvimäki
29095.abstract: Upon assuming power for the first time in 1935, the Norwegian Labour Party delivered on its promise of a major schooling reform. The reform raised minimum instruction time in less developed rural areas and boosted the resources available to rural schools, reducing class size and increasing teacher salaries. We document that cohorts more intensively affected by the reform significantly increased their education and experienced higher labor income. Our main result is that the schooling reform also substantially increased support for the Norwegian Labour Party in subsequent elections. This additional support persisted for several decades and was pivotal in maintaining support for the social democratic coalition in Norway. These results are not driven by the direct impact of education and are not explained by higher turnout, or greater attention or resources from the Labour Party targeted towards the municipalities most affected by the reform. Rather, our evidence suggests that cohorts that benefited from the schooling reform, and their parents, rewarded the party for delivering a major reform that was beneficial to them.
29095.zh_abstract: 挪威工党于1935年首次执政后，兑现了其进行重大学校改革的承诺。这项改革提高了欠发达农村地区的最低教学时间，并增加了农村学校可获得的资源，从而缩小了班级规模并提高了教师工资。我们记录了受改革影响更强烈的群体显著增加了教育年限并获得了更高的劳动收入。我们的主要结果是，学校改革也大幅增加了挪威工党在随后选举中的支持率。这种额外的支持持续了几十年，并且对于维持挪威社会民主主义联盟的支持至关重要。这些结果并非由教育的直接影响所驱动，也不能用更高的投票率，或工党针对受改革影响最大市镇的更多关注或资源来解释。相反，我们的证据表明，受益于学校改革的群体及其父母，奖励了该党实施了一项对他们有利的重大改革。

29094.title: Present Bias Amplifies the Household Balance-Sheet Channels of Macroeconomic Policy
29094.zh_title: 现时偏向放大宏观经济政策的家庭资产负债表渠道
29094.authors: David Laibson, Peter Maxted, Benjamin Moll
29094.abstract: We study the effects of monetary and fiscal policy in a heterogeneous-agent model where households have present-biased time preferences and naive beliefs. The model features a liquid asset and illiquid home equity, which households can use as collateral for borrowing. Because present bias substantially increases households' marginal propensity to consume (MPC), present bias increases the impact of fiscal policy. Present bias also amplifies the effect of monetary policy but, at the same time, slows down the speed of monetary transmission. Interest rate cuts incentivize households to conduct cash-out refinances, which become targeted liquidity-injections to high-MPC households. But present bias also introduces a motive for households to procrastinate refinancing their mortgages, which slows down the speed with which this monetary channel operates.
29094.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在一个异质性主体模型中货币政策和财政政策的效果，其中家庭具有现时偏向的时间偏好和天真的信念。该模型包含一种流动性资产和一种非流动性住房净值，家庭可以用后者作为借款的抵押品。由于现时偏向显著提高了家庭的边际消费倾向（MPC），现时偏向增加了财政政策的影响。现时偏向也放大了货币政策的效果，但同时也减缓了货币传导的速度。降息激励家庭进行套现再融资，这成为针对高MPC家庭的定向流动性注入。但现时偏向也引入了家庭拖延抵押贷款再融资的动机，从而减缓了这一货币渠道运作的速度。
29094.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, ME；JEL：D14, D15, E03, E2, E21, E5, E62, E71, G4

29093.title: The Economics of Electric Vehicles
29093.abstract: We examine the private and public economics of electric vehicles (EVs) and discuss when market forces will produce the optimal path of EV adoption. Privately, consumer cost savings from EVs vary. Some experience net benefits from choosing gasoline cars, even after accounting for EV subsidies. Publicly, we survey the literature documenting the external costs and benefits of EVs and highlight several themes for optimal policy design including, 1) promoting regional variation in EV policies that align private incentives with social benefits, 2) pursuing a time-path of policies that reflect changing marginal benefits, and 3) rationalizing electricity and gasoline prices to reflect their social marginal cost. On the extensive margin, purchase incentives should ramp-down as learning-by-doing and network externalities (to the extent that they exist) diminish; on the intensive margin, gasoline should become relatively more expensive over time than electricity (per mile traveled) to reflect cleaner marginal emissions from electricity generation.
29093.zh_abstract: 我们考察了电动汽车（EV）的私人经济学和公共经济学，并讨论了市场力量何时会产生电动汽车采用的最优路径。在私人层面，消费者从电动汽车中获得的成本节省各不相同。即使在考虑了电动汽车补贴后，一些人从选择汽油车中获得了净收益。在公共层面，我们综述了记录电动汽车外部成本和收益的文献，并强调了最优政策设计的几个主题，包括：1）促进电动汽车政策的区域差异，使私人激励与社会效益相一致；2）追求反映边际效益变化的时间路径政策；3）使电价和汽油价格合理化，以反映其社会边际成本。在外延边际上，随着干中学和网络外部性（如果存在的话）的减弱，购买激励应逐步降低；在内涵边际上，随着时间的推移，汽油（每英里行驶）应变得相对比电力更昂贵，以反映发电中更清洁的边际排放。

29092.title: Well-being Analysis Favours a Virus-Elimination Strategy for COVID-19
29092.zh_title: 福祉分析支持针对COVID-19的病毒消除策略
29092.authors: John F. Helliwell, Max B. Norton, Shun Wang, Lara B. Aknin, Haifang Huang
29092.abstract: A well-being approach requires looking beyond COVID-19 deaths to compare the performance of elimination versus mitigation strategies as measured by other important supports for well-being. What do the data show? Our comparison based on 2020 data shows a virus elimination strategy to be more successful than other options, whether measured in terms of COVID-19 deaths, overall excess deaths, income, unemployment, trust, or mental and physical health. Countries that chose and followed a strategy of reducing community transmission to zero and keeping it there saved lives and better protected income and employment, all without obvious costs to either the social fabric or the mental health of their populations.
29092.zh_abstract: 福祉方法要求超越COVID-19死亡人数，通过其他对福祉的重要支持指标来比较消除策略与缓解策略的表现。数据显示了什么？我们基于2020年数据的比较表明，无论是在COVID-19死亡人数、总体超额死亡人数、收入、失业率、信任度还是身心健康方面，病毒消除策略都比其他选项更成功。选择并遵循将社区传播降至零并保持这一状态的国家，挽救了生命，并更好地保护了收入和就业，且没有对社会结构或人口心理健康造成明显代价。
29092.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：H12, H51, I14, I18, I31

29091.title: A Synthetic Model of Disruption and Experimentation
29091.zh_title: 颠覆与实验的综合模型
29091.abstract: This paper examines how a firm's choice of the type of experiment impacts on its potential exploitation of new technological opportunities. It does so in the context of the failure of successful firms (or disruption) where the literature has informally suggested that firms undertake errors in experimental choice (in particular, choosing experiments that involved biased signals). It is shown that firms will generically choose biased over unbiased experiments even when there are no differences in their relative costs. This is done to better inform decisions regarding the exploitation of technological opportunities. It is shown that these choices can differ between incumbents and entrants based on their fundamentals as well as because of the anticipation of competition between them.
29091.zh_abstract: 本文研究了企业选择的实验类型如何影响其对新技术机会的潜在利用。这是在成功企业失败（或颠覆）的背景下进行的，文献中非正式地指出企业在实验选择上存在错误（特别是选择涉及有偏信号的实验）。研究表明，即使在没有相对成本差异的情况下，企业通常也会选择有偏实验而非无偏实验。这样做是为了更好地为有关技术机会利用的决策提供信息。研究表明，这些选择在在位企业和新进入企业之间可能因基本面不同以及它们之间竞争的预期而有所差异。

29090.title: Reserves Were Not So Ample After All
29090.zh_title: 储备终究并非如此充裕
29090.authors: Adam Copeland, Darrell Duffie, Yilin Yang
29090.abstract: The Federal Reserve's "balance-sheet normalization," which reduced aggregate reserves between 2017 and September 2019, increased repo rate distortions, the severity of rate spikes, and intraday payment timing stresses, culminating with a significant disruption in Treasury repo markets in mid-September 2019. We show that repo rates rose above efficient-market levels when the total reserve balances held at the Federal Reserve by the largest repo-active bank holding companies declined and that repo rate spikes are strongly associated with delayed intraday payments of reserves to these large bank holding companies. Intraday payment timing stresses are magnified by early-morning settlement of Treasury security issuances. Substantially higher aggregate levels of reserves than existed in the period leading up to September 2019 would likely have eliminated most or all of these payment timing stresses and repo rate spikes.
29090.zh_abstract: 美联储的“资产负债表正常化”在2017年至2019年9月期间减少了总储备，增加了回购利率扭曲、利率飙升的严重程度以及日内支付时间压力，最终在2019年9月中旬导致国债回购市场出现重大混乱。我们表明，当最大的回购活跃银行控股公司在美联储持有的总储备余额下降时，回购利率升至有效市场水平之上，并且回购利率飙升与这些大型银行控股公司的日内储备支付延迟密切相关。国债发行的早间结算放大了日内支付时间压力。与2019年9月之前的时期相比，显著更高的总储备水平很可能消除了大部分或全部这些支付时间压力和回购利率飙升。

29089.title: The Causes of Ukrainian Famine Mortality, 1932-33
29089.zh_title: 1932-33年乌克兰饥荒死亡率的原因
29089.authors: Andrei Markevich, Natalya Naumenko, Nancy Qian
29089.abstract: We construct large, unique panel data to study the causes of Ukrainian famine mortality (Holodomor) during 1932-33 and document several new facts: i) Ukraine (the Soviet Union) produced enough food in 1932 to avoid famine in Ukraine (the Soviet Union); ii) mortality was increasing in the pre-famine ethnic Ukrainian population share and unrelated to food productivity across regions; iii) this pattern exists across the Soviet Union, even outside of Ukraine; iv) the pattern was similar at different administrative levels; v) migration restrictions exacerbated mortality; vi) actual and planned grain procurement were increasing, while actual and planned grain retention (production minus procurement) were decreasing in the ethnic Ukrainian population share across regions. Anti-Ukrainian bias in Soviet policy explains up to 92% of famine mortality in Ukraine and 77% in Ukraine, Russia and Belarus; approximately half of the total effect comes from bias in the centrally planned food procurement policy.
29089.zh_abstract: 我们构建了大型、独特的面板数据来研究1932-33年乌克兰饥荒死亡率（大饥荒）的原因，并记录了几个新事实：i) 乌克兰（苏联）在1932年生产了足够的粮食以避免乌克兰（苏联）发生饥荒；ii) 死亡率随饥荒前乌克兰族人口比例增加而上升，且与各地区粮食生产力无关；iii) 这一模式在整个苏联境内（甚至乌克兰以外）都存在；iv) 该模式在不同行政层级上相似；v) 迁移限制加剧了死亡率；vi) 实际和计划的粮食征购量随乌克兰族人口比例增加而上升，而实际和计划的粮食留存（产量减去征购）则随该比例增加而下降。苏联政策中的反乌克兰偏见解释了乌克兰高达92%的饥荒死亡率，以及乌克兰、俄罗斯和白俄罗斯77%的死亡率；总效应中约一半来自中央计划粮食征购政策中的偏见。

29088.title: Direct and Spillover Effects from Staggered Adoption of Health Policies: Evidence from COVID-19 Stay-at-Home Orders
29088.zh_title: 交错实施健康政策的直接效应与溢出效应：来自COVID-19居家令的证据
29088.authors: Vadim Elenev, Luis E. Quintero, Alessandro Rebucci, Emilia Simeonova
29088.abstract: Local policies can have substantial spillovers both across geographies and markets. Little is known about the impact of public health regulations across administrative borders. We estimate U.S. county level direct and spillover effects of Stay-at-Home-Orders (SHOs) aimed at containing the spread of COVID-19 on mobility and social interaction measures. We propose a modified difference-in-difference regression design, based on contiguous-county triplets. This approach compares treated counties, which adopted the SHO, and neighbors, to the neighbor's neighbors, which we term hinterland, counties. We find that mobility in neighboring counties declined by a third to a half as much as in the treated locations. These spillover effects are concentrated in neighbors that share media markets with treated counties. Using directional mobility data, we decompose the spillover decline in mobility into reductions in external visits coming from the treated county and an even stronger voluntary decline in the neighbor county's own traffic. Together, our results provide strong evidence that SHOs operate through information sharing and illustrate the quantitative importance of voluntary social distancing. The finding that the estimated spillovers are in the same direction as the direct effects casts doubt on the prevailing narrative that a more nationally coordinated policy response would have accomplished a greater reduction in mobility and contacts.
29088.zh_abstract: 地方政策可能在地理区域和市场之间产生显著的溢出效应。关于公共卫生法规在行政边界之外的影响，我们知之甚少。我们估算了美国县级旨在遏制COVID-19传播的居家令对流动性和社交互动指标的直接效应和溢出效应。我们提出了一种基于相邻县三联体的修正双重差分回归设计。该方法将采纳居家令的处理县及其邻居与邻居的邻居（我们称之为腹地县）进行比较。我们发现，邻近县的流动性下降幅度是处理县的三分之一到一半。这些溢出效应集中在与处理县共享媒体市场的邻居中。利用方向性流动性数据，我们将流动性的溢出下降分解为来自处理县的外部访问减少，以及邻居县自身交通更强烈的自愿减少。综合来看，我们的结果提供了强有力的证据，表明居家令通过信息共享发挥作用，并说明了自愿社交距离的量化重要性。估计的溢出效应与直接效应方向相同这一发现，对普遍认为更全国协调的政策响应本可实现更大流动性和接触减少的说法提出了质疑。

29087.title: Recreational Marijuana Laws and the Use of Opioids: Evidence from NSDUH Microdata
29087.zh_title: 娱乐性大麻合法化与阿片类药物使用：来自NSDUH微观数据的证据
29087.authors: Mir M. Ali, Chandler B. McClellan, Ryan Mutter, Daniel I. Rees
29087.abstract: Recent studies have concluded that state laws legalizing medical marijuana can reduce deaths from opioid overdoses. Using data from the National Survey on Drug Use and Health, a survey uniquely suited to assessing drug misuse, we examine the relationship between recreational marijuana laws (RMLs) and the use of opioids. Standard difference-in-differences (DD) regression estimates indicate that RMLs do not affect the likelihood of misusing prescription pain relievers such as OxyContin, Percocet, and Vicodin. Although DD regression estimates provide evidence that state laws legalizing recreational marijuana can reduce the frequency of misusing prescription pain relievers, event-study estimates are noisy and suggest that any effect on the frequency of misuse is likely transitory.
29087.zh_abstract: 最近的研究得出结论，允许医用大麻的州法律可以减少阿片类药物过量死亡。使用国家药物使用与健康调查（一项特别适合评估药物滥用的调查）的数据，我们研究了娱乐性大麻合法化与阿片类药物使用之间的关系。标准双重差分回归估计表明，娱乐性大麻合法化不影响滥用处方止痛药（如奥施康定、帕考西特和维柯丁）的可能性。尽管双重差分回归估计提供了证据表明允许娱乐性大麻的州法律可以减少滥用处方止痛药的频率，但事件研究估计结果噪声较大，并表明任何对滥用频率的影响很可能是暂时的。
